error.bhd-00212: Folder could not be deleted because it contains library elements in use
error.bhd-00212_description: Error message in Folder management: This message is displayed when a user attempts to delete a folder that contains library elements currently in use. It explains why the deletion failed, guiding the user to address the dependencies before the folder can be deleted.
error.bhd-00213_description: Error message in a notification: Informs the user that their request was denied due to insufficient access permissions. This message is part of an error notification from BMC Helix Dashboards.
error.bhd-00214: To use this service, you need to activate nested folder feature.
error.bhd-00214_description: Error notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a specific service or feature cannot be used because the "nested folder feature" is not activated. It prompts the user to enable this feature to proceed.
error.bhd-00215_description: Error message in a notification: Informs the user that a requested or expected folder could not be found. This message indicates an operation failed due to the folder's absence.
error.bhd-00216: a folder with the same name already exists in the current location
error.bhd-00216_description: Error message in a notification during folder creation in BMC Helix Dashboards: It informs the user that a folder with the chosen name already exists in the current location, preventing the creation of a duplicate folder.
error.bhd-00217: a folder/dashboard with the same uid already exists
error.bhd-00217_description: Error Message in a notification banner or modal dialog: This message informs the user that an operation to create or import a folder or dashboard failed because an item with the same unique identifier (UID) already exists. It indicates a violation of the unique UID constraint for these entities.
error.bhd-00218: the folder has been changed by someone else
error.bhd-00218_description: Error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that their attempted operation on a folder failed because another user has concurrently modified it. This message helps prevent data conflicts and ensures the user is aware of the change.
error.bhd-00219_description: Error Message in a Notification banner: Informs the user that an attempted folder move operation has failed. This message appears when a user tries to move a folder within the application, and the system is unable to complete the action.
error.bhd-00220_description: Error message in a notification: Notifies the user that an operation involving the Folder API has failed. This error occurs when the system encounters a problem while interacting with dashboard folders.
error.bhd-00221_description: Error message in an alert notification: Informs the user that the system was unable to retrieve the necessary permissions for a folder. This typically occurs when a user attempts an action (e.g., viewing, modifying, sharing) that requires validating or fetching folder permissions.
error.bhd-00222_description: Error message in an error notification within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system encountered an issue while attempting to verify access permissions for a folder. This message is displayed when an action requiring folder permission checks fails.
error.bhd-00223_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog: Informs the user that the system failed to create a permission or authorization. This typically occurs due to backend issues or insufficient user privileges, preventing the user from assigning new permissions.
error.bhd-00301: Use folders endpoint for deleting folders.
error.bhd-00301_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards API notifications: This message instructs API users to use the dedicated 'folders' endpoint when deleting folders. It is displayed when an attempt to delete a folder is made via an incorrect or unsupported method.
error.bhd-00302_description: Error message in a notification banner in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a provided or selected dashboard identifier is invalid. This prevents the related operation from completing.
error.bhd-00303: bad request data while restoring dashboard version
error.bhd-00303_description: Error Message in Dashboard Version Management: Informs the user that an attempt to restore a dashboard version failed due to malformed or invalid request data. This indicates an issue with the input provided for the restore operation.
error.bhd-00304: bad request data while restoring deleted dashboard
error.bhd-00304_description: Error message in a user interface notification: Informs the user that an attempt to restore a deleted dashboard failed because the data provided in the request was invalid or malformed.
error.bhd-00305: bad request data while calculating dashboard diff
error.bhd-00305_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user about invalid request data encountered when trying to calculate the difference between two dashboards. This indicates that the parameters or data for the comparison operation were malformed.
error.bhd-00306: bad request data when creating or updating dashboard
error.bhd-00306_description: Error Notification in BMC Helix Dashboards, displayed when attempting to create or update a dashboard: Informs the user that the submitted data for the operation was invalid or malformed, preventing the action from completing successfully.
error.bhd-00307: Use folders endpoint for saving folders.
error.bhd-00307_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards API: This message is displayed when an attempt to save folders is made using an incorrect method, advising the user (likely a developer or integrator) to use the dedicated 'folders endpoint' for this action. It serves as a technical instruction for correct API usage.
error.bhd-00308_description: Error message in a notification or error display area within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user when they attempt to delete a provisioned dashboard, indicating that this action is not allowed. Provisioned dashboards are typically managed externally and cannot be removed directly via the UI.
error.bhd-00309_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards notifications: Informs the user that a predefined limit or quota for a resource or operation has been exceeded. This prevents further action until the quota is reset or increased.
error.bhd-00310_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog: Informs the user that they lack the necessary permissions to access the selected dashboard.
error.bhd-00311_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards notification: Informs the user that a requested dashboard could not be found.
error.bhd-00312_description: Error message in a UI notification: Informs the user that a requested dashboard folder could not be found or accessed.
error.bhd-00313_description: Error message in a UI notification banner: Informs the user that a requested version of a dashboard could not be found. This typically occurs when an attempt is made to load or reference a non-existent dashboard version.
error.bhd-00314_description: Error message in notification banner: Informs the user that the system encountered an issue while attempting to retrieve public dashboards. This message is displayed when the list of public dashboards cannot be successfully loaded.
error.bhd-00315: Error while loading dashboard, dashboard data is invalid
error.bhd-00315_description: Error message in the dashboard view or loading process: Informs the user that a dashboard could not be loaded because its configuration or internal data structure is invalid.
error.bhd-00316: Error while checking if dashboard was starred by user
error.bhd-00316_description: Error message in a notification banner or pop-up: This message indicates a system failure when checking if a user has starred a specific dashboard. This typically occurs during dashboard loading or when the star icon is rendered.
error.bhd-00317: Dashboard folder could not be read
error.bhd-00317_description: Error message in a notification banner: Informs the user that the system failed to read or access a specified dashboard folder. This prevents the user from viewing its contents or interacting with it.
error.bhd-00318: Error while checking if dashboard is provisioned
error.bhd-00318_description: **Error Message** in **BMC Helix Dashboards' notification area**: Informs the user that the system encountered an issue while trying to determine if a specific dashboard has been provisioned. This message indicates a failure during a system check regarding the dashboard's setup status.
error.bhd-00319_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog: Informs the user that their attempt to delete a dashboard has failed.
error.bhd-00320_description: Error message in a notification area: This message indicates that the system failed to retrieve quota information, potentially impacting resource display or functionality within BMC Helix Dashboards.
error.bhd-00321_description: Error message in an error notification: Informs the user that the system was unable to compute a difference or perform a comparison. This may occur when comparing different versions of a dashboard, configurations, or data sets.
error.bhd-00322_description: Error message in a system notification: Informs the user that the system failed to establish a connection with or load reusable library panels. This can occur when a dashboard or panel attempts to utilize these components.
error.bhd-00323_description: Error notification in a notification area within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system failed to update user or resource permissions.
error.bhd-00324_description: Error message in a notification banner or pop-up: Informs the user that the system encountered an issue while verifying their access permissions for a dashboard. This message typically appears when attempting to view or load a dashboard.
error.bhd-00325_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards' dashboard permission settings: Informs the user that the system could not retrieve the permissions for a dashboard.
error.bhd-00326_description: Error message in system notification: Informs the user that the system failed to retrieve their stored preferences. This might happen due to a backend error or network issue.
error.bhd-00327_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog: Informs the user that the main or default home dashboard failed to load when attempting to access it.
error.bhd-00328_description: Error message in the BMC Helix Dashboards UI: Informs the user that an attempt to restore a dashboard was unsuccessful.
error.bhd-00331: bad request data while updating dashboard permissions
error.bhd-00331_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards notification: Informs the user that an attempt to update dashboard permissions failed due to invalid or malformed data in the request. This message helps users understand why their permission changes were not successfully applied.
error.bhd-00401: bad request data while creating new library element
error.bhd-00401_description: Error message in a notification area: Informs the user that the creation of a new library element failed because the request data submitted was invalid or malformed.
error.bhd-00402: bad request data while updating existing library element
error.bhd-00402_description: Error message in notification: Informs the user that the data provided in the request to update an existing library element was invalid or malformed.
error.bhd-00403: insufficient permissions for getting library panel
error.bhd-00403_description: Error message in notification area: Informs the user that they do not have the required permissions to retrieve or view a specific library panel. This prevents the user from accessing a shared, reusable dashboard component.
error.bhd-00404_description: Error message in a notification display within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an attempt to retrieve a folder (e.g., for dashboards or data sources) was unsuccessful. This message appears when the system cannot fetch the requested folder.
error.bhd-00405_description: Error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the creation of a library element was unsuccessful. This message appears when a user attempts to save a reusable dashboard component and the operation fails.
error.bhd-00406_description: Error notification in a UI pop-up or banner: Informs the user that an attempt to delete a library element within BMC Helix Dashboards was unsuccessful. This message is displayed following a user's action to remove a library element.
error.bhd-00407_description: Error Message in a System Notification: Informs the user that the system failed to evaluate their access permissions. This prevents the system from determining if the user has the necessary rights to proceed with an action or view a resource.
error.bhd-00408_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards' UI for library elements: Notifies the user that the system failed to retrieve reusable components (e.g., panels, variables) from the dashboard library.
error.bhd-00409_description: Error message in Notification banner/pop-up: Informs the user that the system failed to retrieve a library element from the central repository. This message appears when an attempt to load or use a stored library component (e.g., a panel, query, or variable) is unsuccessful.
error.bhd-00410: unable to evaluate library panel permissions
error.bhd-00410_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system was unable to determine or verify the permissions for a library panel. This prevents the user from interacting with the panel.
error.bhd-00411_description: Error message in a notification banner or pop-up within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system failed to retrieve or establish necessary connections.
error.bhd-00412_description: Error notification displayed to the user: Indicates that an operation to update a library element (e.g., a shared panel, variable, or data source) in BMC Helix Dashboards has failed.
error.bhd-00414: library element with that name or UID already exists
error.bhd-00414_description: Library element in BMC Helix Dashboards configuration or management UI: An error message displayed when a user attempts to create or update a library element with a name or UID that is already in use, preventing duplicates.
error.bhd-00415: library element could not be found
error.bhd-00415_description: Error message related to a library element in a BMC Helix Dashboards notification: Informs the user that a shared library component (e.g., a panel, variable, or query) could not be found or loaded. This typically occurs when a dashboard or panel tries to use a library element that has been deleted or is inaccessible.
error.bhd-00416: library element connection could not be found
error.bhd-00416_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message is displayed when the system attempts to connect to a library element but fails to find the required connection. It indicates that a reusable component could not be linked or loaded.
error.bhd-00417_description: Error message in system notifications: Informs the user that a folder required for an operation could not be found. This typically occurs when a user attempts to access, save to, or move an item into a non-existent or deleted folder.
error.bhd-00418: the library element has been changed by someone else
error.bhd-00418_description: Error Message for a Library Element: Notifies the user that the library element they are working with has been updated by someone else. This prevents overwriting concurrent changes.
error.bhd-00419_description: Error message in a notification displayed to the user: Informs the user that access to a specified folder has been denied. This usually indicates the user lacks the necessary permissions for that folder.
error.bhd-00420_description: A library element in an error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message informs the user that an attempted action (e.g., deletion or modification) on a library element cannot proceed because other dashboards or components are linked to it.
error.bhd-00421_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards interface: Informs the user that a unique identifier (UID) contains characters not allowed by the system. This prevents the UID from being accepted or processed.
error.bhd-00422_description: Error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a unique identifier (UID) they entered or provided is too long, exceeding the maximum limit of 40 characters.
error.bhd-00501_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an Organization ID (OrgID) required for an operation does not match the one provided or retrieved. This typically indicates an authentication, authorization, or configuration issue.
error.bhd-00502_description: Error Message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that they lack the necessary permissions to view a specific dashboard snapshot. This message is displayed when access is denied.
error.bhd-00503_description: Error message in a notification: This message indicates that a required identifier or parameter for a snapshot (the 'snapshot key') is empty or missing. It is displayed when a crucial piece of information needed to perform a snapshot-related operation is not provided.
error.bhd-00504_description: Error notification message displayed to the user: Informs them that a requested dashboard snapshot could not be found. This occurs if the snapshot was deleted or does not exist.
error.bhd-00505_description: Error message in a notification displayed in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a requested dashboard snapshot could not be found or accessed. This typically occurs when a user tries to view or restore a snapshot that no longer exists.
error.bhd-00506_description: Error message in a notification displayed in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system was unable to retrieve a dashboard snapshot, indicating a failure in fetching the snapshot data.
error.bhd-00507_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system was unable to successfully delete a dashboard snapshot.
error.bhd-00508_description: Error notification in a toast message or banner: Informs the user that the attempt to delete an external dashboard was unsuccessful. This message is displayed when the deletion process encounters an error.
error.bhd-00509: Error while checking permissions for snapshot
error.bhd-00509_description: Error message in notification system: Informs the user that the system encountered an issue while trying to verify their permissions related to a dashboard snapshot. This typically occurs when a user attempts to interact with a snapshot without the required privileges.
error.bhd-00510_description: Error message in the Notification system: Informs the user that a search operation initiated by the user or the system could not be completed successfully.
error.bhd-00601_description: Error message in an error notification within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a requested resource, item, or entity could not be found. This is a generic 'Not Found' error.
error.bhd-00602_description: Error message in the notification system for BMC Helix Dashboards: This message is displayed to the user to indicate an unexpected internal server error has occurred. It signifies a problem on the server side that prevented a requested action from completing successfully.
error.bhd-00604_description: Error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message indicates that an authorization attempt failed because the required 'old token' was found to be empty. This typically points to a session or authentication issue where a previous token was expected but not present.
error.bhd-00605_description: Error message in a user notification: Informs the user that an authentication attempt has failed. This message is displayed when credentials cannot be verified or identity confirmed, typically during login or resource access.
error.bhd-00606_description: Error message in notification: Informs the user they lack authorization to perform an action or access content. This message is displayed when a permission check fails.
error.bhd-00701_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards' notification system: Informs the user that the `userId` provided for an operation is invalid, preventing its completion.
error.bhd-00702_description: Error message in a notification or dialog: Informs the user that the entered organization name is already in use. The user needs to choose a different, unique name.
error.bhd-00703_description: Error message in a notification banner/dialog within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a submitted request failed because the accompanying data was invalid or malformed.
error.bhd-00704: bad request data while updating current organization
error.bhd-00704_description: Error Message in Notifications: Informs the user that an attempt to update the currently selected organization failed because the data provided in the request was invalid or malformed. This error typically occurs when saving changes to organization settings.
error.bhd-00705: bad request data while updating current Organization's address
error.bhd-00705_description: Error message in Organization settings: Informs the user that the data submitted for updating the current organization's address was invalid or malformed, preventing the update from succeeding.
error.bhd-00706: bad request data while adding new user to the current organization
error.bhd-00706_description: Error message when adding a new user: Informs the user that the request data provided to add a new user to the current organization is invalid. This typically occurs due to missing or incorrectly formatted user details.
error.bhd-00707: bad request data while updating users in organization
error.bhd-00707_description: Error message in a notification: Informs the user that an attempt to update user details for an organization failed because the request data provided was invalid.
error.bhd-00708: bad request data while updating organization
error.bhd-00708_description: Error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an attempt to update an organization failed because the submitted request data was invalid or malformed.
error.bhd-00709: bad request data wile updating organization's address
error.bhd-00709_description: Error message in a notification when attempting to update an organization's address: Informs the user that the update failed because the submitted request data was invalid. Note the typo "wile" in the English source string.
error.bhd-00710: bad request data while creating organization
error.bhd-00710_description: Error message in the organization creation workflow: Informs the user that the data submitted to create a new organization was invalid or malformed.
error.bhd-00711: bad request data while updating given user
error.bhd-00711_description: Error notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards user management: Informs the user that the request to update a specific user failed due to invalid or malformed data provided in the request.
error.bhd-00712: bad request data when adding organization invite
error.bhd-00712_description: Error message in a notification: Informs the user that the data provided when attempting to add an organization invitation is malformed or incorrect.
error.bhd-00713: bad request data when adding custom configuration
error.bhd-00713_description: Error message in a notification banner displayed during custom configuration setup: It informs the user that the data provided for the custom configuration was invalid or malformed. The user needs to correct the submitted data.
error.bhd-00714_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog within BMC Helix Dashboards: This message informs the user that a specified role is not valid. It appears when an attempt to assign or use a role fails due to an invalid role input.
error.bhd-00715_description: Error message in a system notification: Informs the user when an operation fails because the provided or referenced organization ID (`orgId`) is invalid. This typically occurs during data input or API interactions.
error.bhd-00716: Cannot change role so that there is no organization admin left
error.bhd-00716_description: Error Message in User Role Management: This message is displayed when an attempt to change a user's role would result in an organization having no remaining administrators. It prevents an organization from losing all administrative control.
error.bhd-00717_description: Error message in organization administration: Informs the user that the action to remove an organization administrator failed because the targeted user is the last remaining administrator for that organization. This ensures an organization always retains at least one administrator.
error.bhd-00718: Can not delete org for current user
error.bhd-00718_description: Error message in Notification banner or dialog: Informs the user that they cannot delete the organization they are currently logged into or associated with. This prevents invalidating the user's active session.
error.bhd-00719: Cannot invite external user when login is disabled.
error.bhd-00719_description: Error message in the user invitation workflow: It is displayed when an administrator attempts to invite an external user while the system's external login feature is disabled. This prevents external users from being able to log in after being invited.
error.bhd-00720_description: Error notification message in the UI: Informs the user that a provided URL is invalid. This typically appears when a user enters or configures a URL that does not meet expected formatting or validation rules.
error.bhd-00721: Cannot assign a role higher than user's role
error.bhd-00721_description: Error message in the user management or role assignment interface: Informs the user that they cannot assign a role that is higher than their own current role due to permission restrictions.
error.bhd-00722_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message is displayed when an attempt is made to create an organization by an entity that is not classified as a "user." It clarifies the permission restriction, indicating that only user accounts have the privilege to perform this action.
error.bhd-00723: Permission denied: not permitted to add an existing user to this organisation
error.bhd-00723_description: Error message in a system notification: Appears when a user attempts to add an existing user account to an organization but lacks the necessary permissions for this action. It indicates that the operation cannot be completed due to insufficient access rights.
error.bhd-00724_description: Error message in a notification area within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a requested or referenced organization could not be located by the system. This typically prevents an action from completing or access to resources associated with that organization.
error.bhd-00725_description: Error message in a notification within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a specified user account could not be found. This message appears when an operation requiring a valid user ID fails.
error.bhd-00726: Failed to delete organization. ID not found
error.bhd-00726_description: Error message in the notification area: Informs the user that the deletion of an organization failed because the specified ID could not be found. This occurs when an attempt is made to delete a non-existent organization.
error.bhd-00727: User is already member of this organization
error.bhd-00727_description: Error message in the user management interface: Informs the user that an attempt to add a user to an organization failed because the user is already a member of that organization. This message prevents duplicate user additions.
error.bhd-00728_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards notification: Informs the user that the system failed to retrieve organization data. This typically prevents access to organization-specific content or functionality.
error.bhd-00729_description: Error message in a notification area of BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system failed to retrieve quota (resource limit) information.
error.bhd-00730_description: Error message in a system notification: Informs the user that their attempt to update an organization's details or settings was unsuccessful.
error.bhd-00731_description: Error message in organization settings: Informs the user that the attempt to update the organization's address failed. This typically appears after a user tries to save changes to the organization's address in the UI.
error.bhd-00732: Failed to get users for current organization
error.bhd-00732_description: Error Message in an error notification within BMC Helix Dashboards: This message informs the user that the system was unable to retrieve the list of users for the currently selected organization. It appears when an operation requiring user data, such as managing users or setting sharing permissions, fails.
error.bhd-00733: Could not add user to organization
error.bhd-00733_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: This notification is displayed when an attempt to add a user to an organization fails.
error.bhd-00734: Failed to get users for organization
error.bhd-00734_description: Error message in User interface: This message informs the user that the system was unable to retrieve the list of users for a specific organization. It typically appears after an attempt to access or manage organization users fails.
error.bhd-00735: Failed to get user auth info
error.bhd-00735_description: Error message in a notification popup or banner in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system failed to retrieve their authentication details. This typically indicates a backend service issue or a problem with the user's session.
error.bhd-00736_description: Error message in an error notification: Informs the user that an attempt to update an organization user was unsuccessful.
error.bhd-00737: Failed to remove user from organization
error.bhd-00737_description: Error message in a system notification: Informs the user that an operation to remove a user from an organization has failed.
error.bhd-00738_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog: Informs the user that an attempt to update the resource quotas for an organization has failed. This message typically appears after an administrative action to modify organization-level limits within BMC Helix Dashboards.
error.bhd-00739_description: Error notification displayed in the UI: Informs the user that an attempt to search for organizations (orgs) was unsuccessful, likely due to a backend service or network issue.
error.bhd-00740_description: Error message in a notification: Displayed when the system fails to correctly interpret or extract a user's identifier. This can happen during authentication or when processing user-related data, indicating an internal system error.
error.bhd-00741: Failed to get invites from db
error.bhd-00741_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog: Informs the user that the system failed to retrieve a list of invitations from the database.
error.bhd-00742: Failed to query db for existing user check
error.bhd-00742_description: Error message in the notification system within BMC Helix Dashboards: Indicates a failure when the system attempted to query the database to verify the existence of a user. This error suggests a backend issue preventing a successful database lookup for user validation.
error.bhd-00743_description: Error message in a notification banner or toast: Informs the user that the system failed to evaluate necessary permissions for a requested action. This prevents the operation from proceeding.
error.bhd-00744_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards notification system: Informs the user when the system encounters an internal error and is unable to generate a required random string. This typically indicates a system-level issue affecting internal processes or security.
error.bhd-00745: Failed to save invite to database
error.bhd-00745_description: Error message in a notification banner: Informs the user that an attempt to save an invitation to the database has failed. This typically occurs when inviting users to a dashboard or organization within BMC Helix Dashboards.
error.bhd-00746_description: Error Notification in BMC Helix Dashboards after a user attempts to send an email invitation: Informs the user that the system failed to send the email invite. This message indicates that the requested email invitation could not be delivered.
error.bhd-00747: Failed to update invite with email sent info
error.bhd-00747_description: Error Message when managing invitations: Informs the user that the system failed to update the invitation record with the information that its corresponding email was sent. This typically indicates a backend issue with logging the email sending status.
error.bhd-00748_description: Error notification displayed to the user: Informs that an attempt to update an invitation's status (e.g., accept, decline, revoke) was unsuccessful.
error.bhd-00761: Error while trying to create org user
error.bhd-00761_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog: Informs the user that an attempt to create an organization user within the dashboard system failed. This message appears when the user's action to provision a new user could not be completed.
error.bhd-00762_description: Error message in a notification banner or alert: Informs the user that an email invitation to an organization failed to send. The `invited_to_org` part is a placeholder for the recipient's email address or identifier.
error.bhd-00763: SMTP not configured, check your grafana.ini config file's [smtp] section
error.bhd-00763_description: Error message in a notification alert: Informs the user that SMTP is not configured, preventing email-related functions. It directs the user to check the `[smtp]` section of the `grafana.ini` file for resolution.
error.bhd-00764_description: Error message in a notification popup or banner: Appears when the system fails to successfully create a new organization.
error.bhd-00765: bad request data while adding a new user to current organization
error.bhd-00765_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog: This message indicates that the data provided when attempting to add a new user to the current organization was invalid or poorly formatted. This prevents the user creation action from succeeding.
error.bhd-00801_description: Error message in a notification: Informs the user that the configuration parameters 'action' and 'actionPrefix' are mutually exclusive and cannot be defined together. This appears during validation when configuring properties for a dashboard component or alert.
error.bhd-00802: at least one search option must be provided
error.bhd-00802_description: Error message in a search interface notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that at least one search option is required to perform a search operation.
error.bhd-00803_description: Error message in a notification: Informs the user that an internal `namespacedId` is not valid. This typically indicates an issue with a system-specific identifier used for resources.
error.bhd-00804: could not get org user permissions
error.bhd-00804_description: Error message in the application UI: Informs the user that the system could not fetch the required permissions for an organizational user, potentially affecting their ability to access or perform actions.
error.bhd-00805_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system was unable to retrieve necessary permissions. This typically occurs when loading a resource or performing an action that requires a permission check.
error.bhd-00806_description: Error message in a notification or error display: Informs the user that a request sent to the system contained invalid or malformed data. This string serves as a prefix for a more detailed explanation of the specific issue.
error.bhd-00807: bad request data while setting resource permissions for a user
error.bhd-00807_description: Error Message in notification: Notifies that the data sent to set resource permissions for a user was malformed or incorrect. This occurs during user permission management operations when the input is invalid.
error.bhd-00808: bad request data while setting resource permissions for a team
error.bhd-00808_description: Error message in Notification system: This message indicates that an operation to set resource permissions for a team failed because the request contained invalid or malformed data. It is displayed to inform the user about the reason for the failure.
error.bhd-00809: bad request data when setting resource permissions for a built-in role
error.bhd-00809_description: Error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message is displayed when the system encounters invalid request data while attempting to set or update resource permissions for a built-in role. It indicates an issue with the data payload sent to the server.
error.bhd-00901: bad request data while creating a data source
error.bhd-00901_description: Error Message in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message informs the user that the data provided when attempting to create a new data source was invalid or malformed.
error.bhd-00902: bad request data while updating an existing data source by its sequential ID
error.bhd-00902_description: Error message in Data Source Management: Informs the user that an attempt to update an existing data source using its sequential ID failed due to invalid request data.
error.bhd-00903: bad request data while update an existing data source
error.bhd-00903_description: Error message in the Data Source Configuration screen: Informs the user that the request data provided to update an existing data source was invalid or malformed.
error.bhd-00904_description: Error message displayed when adding a data source in BMC Helix Dashboards: This informs the user that the operation to add a new data source was unsuccessful.
error.bhd-00905_description: Error message in an error notification: Informs the user that a provided identifier (ID) is not valid. This error indicates that an ID for an entity within BMC Helix Dashboards (e.g., dashboard, panel, data source) is incorrect or malformed.
error.bhd-00906_description: Error message in a notification banner in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message is displayed when an action requiring a valid datasource ID cannot be completed because the ID is either missing or invalid.
error.bhd-00907_description: Error message in an error notification: Informs the user that a provided URL is invalid after a validation check.
error.bhd-00908_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a provided Unique Identifier (UID) is not valid. This typically occurs when a UID does not meet required format or existence criteria.
error.bhd-00909_description: Error message in a notification or configuration dialog: Informs the user that a required unique identifier (UID) for a data source is missing. This prevents a dashboard, panel, or other component from functioning correctly, indicating a configuration issue.
error.bhd-00910_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message is displayed when a required data source name is either missing or invalid during configuration or a related operation. It prompts the user to provide a valid name to proceed.
error.bhd-00911_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards related to datasource management: Notifies the user that a required identifier for a datasource is missing. This prevents operations such as saving or loading a dashboard or panel from completing.
error.bhd-00912_description: Error notification in the application: Informs the user that a data source required for an operation was not found.
error.bhd-00913: You do not have enough permission to update datasource
error.bhd-00913_description: Error message in an error notification: Informs the user that they do not have sufficient permissions to update a data source.
error.bhd-00914: You'll need additional permissions to perform this action. Permissions needed: datasources.permissions:write
error.bhd-00915_description: Error message in the data source management interface: Informs the user that an attempted update to a data source failed because the data source is configured as read-only.
error.bhd-00916_description: Error message in Data Source Management: Informs the user that a selected data source cannot be deleted because it is read-only. This typically applies to system-managed or predefined data sources.
error.bhd-00917: You do not have enough permission to delete datasource
error.bhd-00917_description: Error Message in notification banner or dialog: Informs the user that they lack the necessary permissions to delete a data source. This message is displayed when a user attempts to delete a data source without the required authorization.
error.bhd-00918_description: Error message in an error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that they lack the necessary permissions to access a specified data source.
error.bhd-00919_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that they lack the necessary permissions to access a resource or perform an action.
error.bhd-00920: Datasource has already been updated by someone else. Please reload and try again
error.bhd-00920_description: Error message in the BMC Helix Dashboards notification system: Informs a user that a datasource they are attempting to update has already been modified by another user, indicating a concurrent modification conflict. It instructs the user to reload the page to get the latest version before retrying their action.
error.bhd-00921_description: Error message in notification area: Informs the user that the system failed to retrieve or access data from one or more configured datasources. This can occur during dashboard loading, panel data refresh, or when configuring datasource connections.
error.bhd-00922_description: Error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system failed to retrieve data from a configured datasource.
error.bhd-00923_description: Error notification in a UI dialog or banner when adding a datasource: Informs the user that an attempt to add a new datasource has failed. This message is followed by details about the specific reason for the failure.
error.bhd-00924_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an attempt to delete a datasource has failed. This message is typically followed by specific details about the failure.
error.bhd-00925_description: Error Message in a notification or error dialog: This message informs the user that the attempt to add a new datasource to BMC Helix Dashboards has failed. It indicates an issue encountered during the datasource creation process.
error.bhd-00926_description: Error message in a notification banner/toast in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that their attempt to update a data source configuration has failed.
error.bhd-00927_description: Error Message in a notification banner or pop-up: This message informs the user that an attempt to update a datasource failed. It is typically followed by specific error details.
error.bhd-00928_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an attempt to delete a datasource was unsuccessful. This message is displayed when the system encounters an issue during the deletion process.
error.bhd-00929_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system failed to load the necessary metadata for a data source. This prevents proper interaction with or configuration of the data source.
error.bhd-00930_description: Error message in a BMC Helix Dashboards notification: Informs the user that a plugin failed to retrieve its necessary operating context. This error indicates an internal system issue preventing the plugin from functioning correctly.
error.bhd-00931_description: Error message in an error notification banner: Informs the user that a request made to a plugin has failed. This indicates a problem with the plugin's operation or communication within BMC Helix Dashboards.
error.bhd-00932: Failed to unmarshal detailed response from backend plugin
error.bhd-00932_description: Error message in notification: Informs the user that the application failed to deserialize a detailed response from a backend plugin. This suggests an issue with data formatting or communication from the backend service.
error.bhd-00936: bad request data while adding correlation
error.bhd-00936_description: Error message in a UI notification: Informs the user that the data provided or submitted for adding a correlation was invalid or poorly formatted. This indicates an issue with the format or content of the correlation request data.
error.bhd-00937: At least one of label, description or config is required
error.bhd-00937_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that when configuring or creating an item, at least one of the 'label', 'description', or 'config' fields must be provided. This is a validation error displayed when attempting to save or proceed without meeting this mandatory input requirement.
error.bhd-00938: bad request data while updating a correlation
error.bhd-00938_description: Error message in a system notification: Informs the user that the data provided to update a correlation was invalid or malformed. This prevents the correlation update from succeeding.
error.bhd-00939: Correlation can only be edited via provisioning
error.bhd-00939_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that correlation settings cannot be edited directly through the user interface, as modification is exclusively managed via provisioning.
error.bhd-00940_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog: Informs the user that BMC Helix Dashboards could not find any correlations between the data or events being analyzed. This typically appears when a feature designed to establish relationships fails to identify them.
error.bhd-00941_description: Error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a data source designated as the source for a dashboard panel or query could not be found. This typically means the data source is missing, deleted, or misconfigured, preventing data display.
error.bhd-00942_description: Error message in a notification banner within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a requested data correlation or relationship could not be found or established.
error.bhd-00943_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an attempt to retrieve correlated data or relationships has failed. This typically occurs when a dashboard component tries to fetch linked data or related events but encounters an issue.
error.bhd-00944_description: Error notification message in a notification banner or pop-up: Informs the user that the operation to add a correlation was unsuccessful. This typically occurs when attempting to define a relationship or link between dashboard elements, data points, or entities.
error.bhd-00945_description: Error message in a notification banner or pop-up: Informs the user that the system failed to retrieve correlation data. This typically occurs when the dashboard attempts to link related metrics, logs, or events but encounters a backend or data retrieval issue.
error.bhd-00946_description: Error notification in a UI banner or dialog: Informs the user that their attempt to delete a correlation object or rule has failed. This message confirms the unsuccessful execution of the deletion operation.
error.bhd-00947_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog within the BMC Helix Dashboards UI: Informs the user that an attempt to update a configured data or event correlation has failed. This typically occurs when saving changes to how different pieces of data or events are linked or related within the dashboard.
error.bhd-01001: bad request data while adding new query to query history
error.bhd-01001_description: Error message in the notification system: This message is displayed when an attempt to add a new query to the query history fails because the request data provided is invalid or malformed.
error.bhd-01002: bad request data while Updating comment for query in query history
error.bhd-01002_description: Error message in Notification banner/dialog: Informs the user that the attempt to update a comment for a query in the query history failed because the data sent in the request was invalid or malformed.
error.bhd-01003: Query in query history not found
error.bhd-01003_description: Error message in UI notification: Informs the user that a specific query they are trying to access or reference could not be found in the query history. This prevents the user from viewing or re-running the intended query.
error.bhd-01004_description: Error message in a notification banner or error dialog: Informs the user that the system failed to create a record of a recent query in the query history feature. This typically indicates a backend issue preventing the storage of query history.
error.bhd-01005_description: Error message in a notification within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system failed to retrieve the query history.
error.bhd-01006: Failed to delete query from query history
error.bhd-01006_description: Error message in Notification: Informs the user that an attempt to delete a query from the query history failed.
error.bhd-01007: Failed to star query in query history
error.bhd-01007_description: Error message in Query History: Informs the user that an attempt to mark a query as a favorite within the query history has failed.
error.bhd-01008: Failed to unstar query in query history
error.bhd-01008_description: Error Message in Query History: Informs the user when an attempt to unstar (remove from favorites) a query within the query history fails. This message indicates that the query remains starred despite the user's action.
error.bhd-01009: Failed to update comment of query in query history
error.bhd-01009_description: Error Notification in Query History: Informs the user that an attempt to update a comment associated with a specific query in the Query History has failed.
error.bhd-01011_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an attempt to delete query history was unsuccessful.
error.bhd-01012_description: Error message in a notification: Informs the user that an attempt to mark a query history entry as a favorite (star it) has failed. This message typically appears after a user interaction to star an item.
error.bhd-01013_description: Error message in a notification or alert area: Notifies the user that an attempt to remove a star (unstar) from an item in their query history has failed.
error.bhd-01014: Failed to update comment of query in query history
error.bhd-01014_description: Error message in notification area or dialog: displayed when the system fails to save an updated comment for a specific query within the user's query history. This indicates a backend or system issue preventing the comment modification.
error.bhd-01101: bad request data while installing plugin
error.bhd-01101_description: Error notification displayed during plugin installation: Informs the user that the plugin installation failed because the data provided for the request was invalid or malformed.
error.bhd-01102: bad request data while updating plugin setting
error.bhd-01102_description: Error message in Notification area during a plugin setting update: This message is displayed when the system fails to update a plugin's settings because the data provided in the update request was invalid or malformed.
error.bhd-01103_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Displays when a user attempts to access a resource or perform an action without the necessary permissions.
error.bhd-01104: Cannot install or change a Core plugin
error.bhd-01104_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user when an attempt to install or modify a core plugin fails. This indicates that core plugins are typically protected from user alterations.
error.bhd-01105_description: Error Message in a Notification or Error Dialog: Informs the user that the attempted uninstallation of a plugin failed because the plugin is a core component essential for the system's operation. This message prevents users from inadvertently removing critical system functionalities.
error.bhd-01106: Plugin not found, no installed plugin with that id
error.bhd-01106_description: Error message in notification area: Notifies the user that a required plugin could not be found because no plugin with the specified ID is installed. This often appears when a dashboard or panel configuration relies on a missing plugin.
error.bhd-01107_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a required plugin is not installed, which prevents a dashboard component or functionality from loading or working correctly.
error.bhd-01108_description: Error message in an error notification within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a specified file does not exist. This message typically appears when a required file for an operation (e.g., import, export, or configuration) cannot be located or accessed.
error.bhd-01109_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user when they attempt to install a plugin that is already present in the system. This prevents duplicate installations and confirms the plugin's existing status.
error.bhd-01110: Failed to get list of plugins
error.bhd-01110_description: Error message in an on-screen notification within BMC Helix Dashboards: It informs the user that the system failed to retrieve the list of available plugins. This error prevents the display or management of plugins.
error.bhd-01111_description: Error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system was unable to retrieve a markdown file. This typically occurs when trying to load or display content sourced from a markdown file.
error.bhd-01112_description: Error Message in a notification: Informs the user that the system failed to retrieve settings for a plugin. This indicates a problem preventing the plugin from loading or functioning as expected.
error.bhd-01113: Failed to unmarshal detailed response from backend plugin
error.bhd-01113_description: Error Message in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message informs the user that the system could not correctly parse the detailed data response received from a backend plugin. It indicates a failure in deserializing or understanding the plugin's output, preventing the display of specific information.
error.bhd-01114_description: Error message in a notification: Informs the user that a plugin installation has failed. This message is displayed when the system encounters an issue preventing the successful installation of a plugin.
error.bhd-01115_description: Error notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an attempt to uninstall a plugin has failed. This message is displayed when the uninstallation process could not be completed successfully.
error.bhd-01116_description: Error message in an error notification within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the application was unable to retrieve or load dashboards associated with a plugin. This typically appears when an attempt to access plugin-specific dashboards fails.
error.bhd-01117_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog: Informs the user that an attempt to update or save the configuration settings for a plugin was unsuccessful.
error.bhd-01201: bad request data while deleting multiple annotations
error.bhd-01201_description: Error message in a notification area: Informs the user that an attempt to delete multiple annotations failed because the request data provided was invalid or malformed.
error.bhd-01202: bad request data while creating annotation
error.bhd-01202_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards notification: Informs the user that the data provided when attempting to create an annotation was invalid or malformed.
error.bhd-01203: bad request data while updating annotationbad request data while updating annotation
error.bhd-01203_description: Error message in a BMC Helix Dashboards notification: Informs the user that an annotation update operation failed because the submitted request data was invalid. The English source string contains a repetitive phrase which is likely a typo.
error.bhd-01204: bad request data while creating annotation in Graphite format
error.bhd-01204_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message is displayed when an attempt to create an annotation fails because the provided request data is invalid or malformed for the Graphite format. It indicates a data validation error related to the annotation's content or structure.
error.bhd-01205_description: Error Message in an error notification: This message is displayed when an `annotationId` provided for an annotation-related operation is invalid. It signifies a data validation error for the specified annotation identifier.
error.bhd-01206_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: This notification appears when an attempt to save a Graphite annotation fails. It informs the user that the save operation was unsuccessful.
error.bhd-01207: Invalid dashboard UID in annotation request
error.bhd-01207_description: Error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: This notification is displayed when a user attempts to create or modify an annotation, but the dashboard identifier (UID) provided in the request is not valid.
error.bhd-01208: Access denied to mass delete annotations
error.bhd-01208_description: Error message in a notification within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that they lack the necessary permissions to perform a mass deletion of annotations.
error.bhd-01209: Access denied to save the annotation
error.bhd-01209_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that they lack the necessary permissions to save an annotation. This message is displayed when an attempt to save an annotation fails due to insufficient access rights.
error.bhd-01210_description: Error message in a notification: Informs the user that a requested or expected annotation could not be found by the system. This might occur when attempting to view or interact with a deleted or non-existent annotation.
error.bhd-01211_description: Error message in a notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message is displayed when the system encounters an issue while attempting to verify a user's permissions related to dashboard annotations. This prevents the user from accessing or interacting with annotations.
error.bhd-01212_description: Error Message in BMC Helix Dashboards' notification area: Informs the user when an attempt to delete annotations has failed. This message is displayed after a user initiates the deletion of one or more annotations on a dashboard.
error.bhd-01213_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system was unable to delete a dashboard annotation. This notification typically appears when there is a problem with the deletion request, such as a backend error or permission issue.
error.bhd-01214_description: Error message in a notification popup or banner: Informs the user that the system was unable to successfully save an annotation they were trying to create or update on a dashboard.
error.bhd-01215_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards notification: Informs the user that an attempt to update an annotation has failed.
error.bhd-01216_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards notification: Informs the user that annotation tags could not be found or loaded. This message appears when the system fails to retrieve expected annotation data.
error.bhd-01217_description: Error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an expected annotation, such as one associated with a dashboard, could not be located or retrieved by the system.
error.bhd-01218_description: Error message in a notification banner within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system failed to retrieve annotations. This typically appears when an attempt to load or display annotations on a graph or timeline is unsuccessful.
error.bhd-01219_description: Confirmation message in a notification banner or toast in BMC Helix Dashboards: Confirms to the user that annotations have been successfully deleted. Despite being nested under the 'error' key path, this message indicates a successful operation.
error.bhd-01301_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: This notification informs the user that an operation or request failed because the data provided was invalid or malformed. This typically occurs due to incorrect user input or an internal data generation issue.
error.bhd-01302_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog: Informs the user that an attempted action or system operation was invalid or not permitted. This message is displayed when a requested operation cannot be executed due to being unrecognized or disallowed.
error.bhd-01303_description: Error message in an error notification: Informs the user that a provided value and its associated data type are invalid, typically occurring during data input, configuration, or API interactions where data validation fails.
error.bhd-01304_description: Error message in a notification: This message indicates that an API request, typically initiated by a user action, failed because the data sent in the request body was invalid or malformed. It informs the user that the server rejected their input due to a data format issue.
error.bhd-01305_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog: Informs the user that provided input or a system response within BMC Helix Dashboards is not in a valid JSON format.
error.bhd-01306_description: Error Message in a notification: Informs the user that the entered or provided User ID is incorrect or does not exist. This typically occurs during login or when attempting user-related operations.
error.bhd-01307_description: Error message in the notification area: Indicates that a required role name was not provided during a role-related operation.
error.bhd-01308_description: Error message in a notification: Informs the user that they are attempting to update a system-defined role, which is not permitted. This indicates that system roles are read-only and cannot be modified.
error.bhd-01309_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that predefined, essential system roles cannot be deleted. This message is displayed when a user attempts to remove a system role, typically from the role management interface.
error.bhd-01310: This role is associated with users. Before deleting the role, delete all the associations.
error.bhd-01311: This role is associated with teams. Before deleting the role, delete all the associations.
error.bhd-01312_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog: Informs the user that the provided role identifier is invalid. This typically occurs when attempting an operation that requires a valid role ID, such as role assignment or modification.
error.bhd-01313_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards' notification system: Informs the user that a specified role ID could not be validated. This typically appears when an invalid or non-existent role ID is provided during a configuration or operation.
error.bhd-01314_description: Error message in a notification within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a provided or selected role identifier is not recognized or valid.
error.bhd-01315_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards system notification: Indicates that the data (payload) exchanged with the system was invalid or malformed. This prevents the intended operation from completing successfully.
error.bhd-01316_description: Error Message in BMC Helix Dashboards notification: Informs the user that the provided or processed `userId` is invalid. This typically occurs after an input validation check fails.
error.bhd-01317_description: Error message in a notification banner or pop-up within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the entered User ID is invalid, possibly due to format issues or not being recognized by the system.
error.bhd-01318_description: Error message in an error notification: Informs the user that a provided 'teamId' is not valid. This typically prevents an operation from completing successfully.
error.bhd-01319_description: Error message in a system notification: Informs the user that an operation (e.g., assigning a dashboard, managing permissions, adding a user to a team) failed because the specified team could not be found. Note: The English string contains a grammatical error ("exists" instead of "exist").
error.bhd-01320_description: Error Message in Error Notifications in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that they lack the necessary permissions to perform a requested action or access a specific resource.
error.bhd-01321_description: Error message in an error notification: Informs the user that the IMS_JWT (Identity Management Service JSON Web Token) used for authentication is invalid. This typically prevents access or operations and may require re-authentication.
error.bhd-01322_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user or system that an API request failed because the authorization header, necessary for authentication, was missing or empty. This prevents successful verification of the user's or client's identity.
error.bhd-01323_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user or administrator that the IMS_JWT (Identity Management System JSON Web Token) used for authentication or authorization is invalid or incorrect. This prevents access or operations requiring a valid token.
error.bhd-01324: No roles assigned to the user.
error.bhd-01324_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: This notification indicates that the current user account has no assigned roles, preventing them from accessing features or performing actions due to insufficient permissions.
error.bhd-01325: Role not allowed to fetch dashboards.
error.bhd-01325_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards' notification area: Informs the user that their assigned role does not have the necessary permissions to fetch or view dashboards.
error.bhd-01326_description: Error message in a notification display area within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that they attempted to access a resource or perform an action without the necessary authorization. This indicates a permission-related failure.
error.bhd-01327_description: Error Message in Notification display in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a specified or required role could not be located or does not exist. This might occur during user management operations or when verifying access permissions.
error.bhd-01328: Role with the same name already exists
error.bhd-01328_description: Error Message in Role Management UI: Informs the user that the role name they are attempting to use already exists, preventing the creation of duplicate role names.
error.bhd-01329_description: Error message in the notification area of BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system failed to retrieve dashboards. This typically appears when there's a problem with data retrieval, such as network issues or server errors.
error.bhd-01330: Failed to get the view list
error.bhd-01330_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards UI: Informs the user that the system failed to retrieve the list of available views. This typically occurs when a backend service or network issue prevents the display or selection of views.
error.bhd-01331_description: Error message in a notification within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system failed to retrieve data customized for their profile or preferences, which may affect personalized views or content.
error.bhd-01332_description: Error notification in the system notification area: Informs the user that an operation to delete personalized data, such as user-specific dashboards or settings in BMC Helix Dashboards, has failed.
error.bhd-01334_description: Error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system encountered a problem when attempting to verify their access permissions. This typically indicates an internal system issue preventing authorization.
error.bhd-01335_description: Error message in a system notification: Informs the user that the application failed to retrieve user roles. This message is displayed when the system encounters an issue accessing or fetching user role data.
error.bhd-01336: Error building dashboard query for admin
error.bhd-01336_description: Error message in a notification banner or popup within the Dashboard UI: Informs an administrator that the system failed to build or construct a dashboard query. This error is triggered during administrative actions related to dashboard data retrieval.
error.bhd-01337_description: Error Message in the Dashboard Query Builder: Notifies the user that the system encountered an issue while attempting to construct a dashboard query. This generic error indicates a failure in the underlying process of generating the query.
error.bhd-01338_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards notification: Informs the user about an unexpected internal server error that prevented an operation from completing. This is a generic error message displayed when a backend issue occurs.
error.bhd-01339_description: Error message in a notification area within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system encountered an error while attempting to retrieve a user role or a role definition. This may prevent proper access or functionality.
error.bhd-01340_description: Error notification message in a system notification area: Informs the user that an attempt to update a role has failed. This message is displayed when the system encounters an issue during a role modification operation.
error.bhd-01341_description: Error message in a notification area: Informs the user that an attempt to delete a user role in BMC Helix Dashboards has failed. This message is displayed when the system encounters an issue preventing the deletion of the role.
error.bhd-01342_description: Error message in a notification banner or pop-up: Notifies the user that an attempt to search for roles (e.g., for user management or access configuration) has failed. This typically indicates a system issue preventing the retrieval of role information.
error.bhd-01343_description: Error notification message in the UI: Informs an administrator that an attempt to update the role(s) assigned to one or more users was unsuccessful. This message is displayed when a system operation to modify user roles fails.
error.bhd-01344_description: Error message in a notification: Indicates that an operation to update a 'Teams Role' within BMC Helix Dashboards failed. This message is displayed when the system encounters an issue while trying to modify permissions or group assignments for a user group.
error.bhd-01345_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Displayed to the user when the system fails to retrieve a list of permissions. This prevents the application from accurately showing or validating access rights.
error.bhd-01346_description: Error message in a notification banner or pop-up: Informs the user that an attempt to update or save changes to a list of permissions has failed. This typically occurs when a user tries to modify access rights for a resource (e.g., dashboard, folder) but the operation cannot be completed due to insufficient privileges, network issues, or a server-side error.
error.bhd-01347_description: Error message in a notification or pop-up: Informs the user that an attempt to search for users has failed. This message typically appears when the system encounters an issue during a user search operation.
error.bhd-01348: Failed to add user role mapping.
error.bhd-01348_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog: Informs the user that the system failed to successfully add a user role mapping.
error.bhd-01349: Failed to remove user role mapping.
error.bhd-01349_description: Error message in notification area: Informs the user that an attempt to remove a user-role mapping was unsuccessful, typically displayed after a user action in the user or role management interface.
error.bhd-01350_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an attempt to add a specific role to a team has failed. This message is displayed as a notification when the operation cannot be completed.
error.bhd-01351_description: Error Message in Notification: Informs the user that an attempt to remove a role from a team was unsuccessful.
error.bhd-01352_description: Error message in a notification pop-up or error display: Informs the user that an unforeseen problem has occurred within the system.
error.bhd-01364_description: Error message in an error notification within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a requested record or data entity could not be found. This occurs when a retrieval operation fails to locate the specified item.
error.bhd-01365_description: Error message in the notification area: Informs the user that their attempt to create a new role has failed. This typically appears after a user initiates a role creation action in the Role Management interface.
error.bhd-01366_description: Error message in a notification banner: Informs the user that an attempt to search for "Teams" within BMC Helix Dashboards was unsuccessful. This message indicates the system failed to retrieve or process the team search request.
error.bhd-01367_description: Error message in a notification within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a provided or selected Team ID is invalid. This typically occurs when an action related to team management cannot proceed due to an incorrect identifier.
error.bhd-01401: bad request data while updating playlist
error.bhd-01401_description: Error message in a notification after a playlist update attempt: Informs the user that the update failed due to invalid request data. This suggests that the provided playlist information did not meet the required format or validation.
error.bhd-01402: bad request data while creating playlist
error.bhd-01402_description: Error Message in the Playlist Creation feature: Notifies the user that the data submitted to create a playlist was invalid or malformed. This error prevents the playlist from being successfully created.
error.bhd-01403_description: Error message in a notification or error display: Notifies the user that a search operation they initiated has failed to complete successfully.
error.bhd-01404_description: Error message in a notification: Informs the user that a playlist they attempted to access or reference could not be found. This message is displayed when a requested playlist does not exist.
error.bhd-01405_description: Error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards UI: Informs the user that an attempt to delete a playlist has failed. This message appears as a system notification after a user action.
error.bhd-01406_description: Error message in notification: Informs the user that an attempt to save a playlist has failed. This message appears when the system encounters an issue during the playlist saving process.
error.bhd-01407_description: Error message in the notification area: Informs the user that an attempt to load a playlist of dashboards or reports has failed.
error.bhd-01408_description: Error message in a BMC Helix Dashboards notification: Informs the user that the system was unable to create a playlist as requested. This message appears when an attempt to create a new playlist fails.
error.bhd-01501_description: Error message in a notification: Informs the user that an identifier (ID) entered or referenced is invalid. This could be due to incorrect formatting or non-existence.
error.bhd-01502_description: Error message in a system notification: Informs the user that the data submitted as part of a request was invalid or malformed. This prevents the successful completion of the requested operation.
error.bhd-01503_description: Error message in an error notification: Informs the user that the provided job ID is invalid. This message (bhd-01503) is displayed when an operation receives an unrecognized or malformed job ID.
error.bhd-01504: bad request data while creating a report
error.bhd-01504_description: Error message in an error notification displayed during report creation: This message informs the user that the data provided in the request to create a report was invalid or malformed. This prevents the report from being successfully created.
error.bhd-01505_description: Error message in a notification or alert configuration form: Informs the user that at least one recipient must be specified to proceed. This message is displayed upon validation failure when the recipient field is empty.
error.bhd-01506_description: Error message in a notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message informs the user that an attempt to apply or enforce a domain restriction has failed. This could pertain to data access, user permissions, or data filtering.
error.bhd-01507_description: Error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the entered or selected cron expression is syntactically invalid. This prevents the system from correctly processing a scheduled task.
error.bhd-01508: bad request data while updating report
error.bhd-01508_description: Error message in the report update interface: Notifies the user that an attempt to update a report failed because the data submitted with the request was invalid or malformed.
error.bhd-01509_description: Error message in a notification: Informs the user that the provided or requested report identifier is invalid. This typically appears when a user attempts to access, manage, or generate a report with an incorrect or non-existent ID.
error.bhd-01510: Restriction of internal domains only failed
error.bhd-01510_description: Error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an attempt to apply a restriction for internal domains only has failed. This typically indicates a problem when configuring data source access, sharing, or security policies meant to exclusively permit internal domains.
error.bhd-01511_description: Error message in a notification: This message is displayed when a user attempts to delete reports, but no reports are found or selected for the deletion action. It informs the user that the operation cannot proceed.
error.bhd-01512: bad request payload while setting FTP configuration
