error.bhd-01512_description: Error Message in FTP Configuration UI: Informs the user that the data or request payload submitted for setting up or updating FTP configuration was malformed or invalid.
error.bhd-01513: bad request payload while modifying FTP configurations
error.bhd-01513_description: Error message in the Notification area of BMC Helix Dashboards: This informs the user that an attempt to modify FTP configurations failed due to an invalid or malformed request payload. It indicates an issue with the data being submitted for the configuration change.
error.bhd-01514: bad request payload while setting default FTP configuration
error.bhd-01514_description: Error message in FTP Configuration settings: This message is displayed when the system fails to apply or save the default FTP configuration because the data sent in the request was invalid or malformed. It indicates an issue with the structure or content of the data submitted to the server.
error.bhd-01515: bad request data while sending mail
error.bhd-01515_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards notification: This message indicates that an attempt to send an email failed because the request data provided was invalid or malformed. It appears when the system detects an issue with the email sending parameters.
error.bhd-01516: bad request data while executing report once
error.bhd-01516_description: Error Message in Report Execution: This message informs the user that the request data provided for a one-time report execution was malformed or incorrect. It clarifies that the issue occurred during an immediate, single run of a report.
error.bhd-01517_description: Error message in a system notification or error dialog in BMC Helix Dashboards: Indicates that a required ID is missing for the current operation. This prevents the operation from being completed.
error.bhd-01518: bad request data while disabling report scheduler
error.bhd-01518_description: Error message in the Report Scheduler management interface of BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an attempt to disable a report scheduler failed because the request data was invalid or malformed. This typically indicates an issue with the data being submitted for the disable operation.
error.bhd-01519_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards' report scheduling section: This notification indicates that the list of scheduled reports is currently empty. It means no reports have been configured for scheduling yet.
error.bhd-01520: report scheduler with the same name already exists
error.bhd-01520_description: Error Notification in the Report Scheduler creation or management interface: Informs the user that a report scheduler with the specified name already exists. This typically occurs when a user attempts to save a new or edited scheduler, prompting them to provide a unique name.
error.bhd-01521_description: Error message displayed as a notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that mandatory data fields are empty or incomplete, preventing the completion of an action.
error.bhd-01522: cannot edit the dashboard for existing report schedule
error.bhd-01522_description: Error message in notification area: Informs the user that they cannot edit a dashboard because it is currently associated with an existing report schedule. This prevents unintended changes to reports that are configured to be generated from the dashboard.
error.bhd-01523_description: Error Message in a notification banner in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system could not find or retrieve the necessary tenant-specific details required for a report.
error.bhd-01524: bad request data while setting report branding settings
error.bhd-01524_description: Error message in the notification area of BMC Helix Dashboards: This message informs the user that the request data provided for setting report branding settings was invalid. The branding configuration cannot be applied.
error.bhd-01525: Invalid logo image. Only the following extensions are allowed: .png, .jpg, .jpeg
error.bhd-01526: Invalid image URL. Only the following extensions are allowed: .png, .jpg, .jpeg
error.bhd-01527_description: Error message in an error notification: This message informs the user that the provided URL for a logo is invalid. It typically appears when configuring branding or dashboard settings where a logo URL is required.
error.bhd-01528_description: Error message in a notification: Alerts the user that a URL provided for a dashboard's footer is invalid. This typically occurs during the configuration or saving of dashboard or report settings.
error.bhd-01529: bad request data while updating or creating tenant details
error.bhd-01529_description: Error Message in a notification within BMC Helix Dashboards: This message indicates that the data provided when attempting to update or create tenant details was invalid or malformed. It is shown when an API call or user action to modify tenant configuration fails due to data validation errors.
error.bhd-01530_description: Error message in a system notification: Informs the user that a requested report cannot be retrieved because it is not found in the expected storage location.
error.bhd-01531: File is not available on storage
error.bhd-01531_description: Error message in a notification: Informs the user that a required file is not available on the storage system. This prevents operations that depend on the file, such as loading resources or processing imports.
error.bhd-01532: Some recipients are not internal users
error.bhd-01532_description: Error message in a notification: This message appears when a user attempts to share or send a dashboard or report to recipients who are not internal users of BMC Helix Dashboards, indicating that the action cannot proceed for them.
error.bhd-01533_description: Error message in the Notification system: Informs the user that a specific report scheduler referenced in an operation (e.g., viewing, editing, or execution) does not exist in the system.
error.bhd-01534_description: Error message in a notification area or dialog box: Informs the user that they have exceeded the maximum allowed number of report schedules. This error prevents the creation of additional report schedules.
error.bhd-01535: Failed to get previous FTP configuration
error.bhd-01535_description: Error message in a notification banner: Informs the user that the system failed to retrieve a previously set or saved FTP configuration.
error.bhd-01537: bad request data while deleting report scheduler
error.bhd-01537_description: **Error Message** in **a notification dialog or toast**: It informs the user that an attempt to delete a report scheduler failed because the system received invalid or malformed data in the request. This typically indicates a problem with the data sent from the client to the server during the deletion process.
error.bhd-01538: bad request data while enabling report scheduler
error.bhd-01538_description: Error message in the Report Scheduling feature of BMC Helix Dashboards: This notification appears when the system encounters invalid or malformed data during an attempt to enable the report scheduler. It signifies an issue with the input provided for the enabling request.
error.bhd-01539: Some BCC recipients are not internal users
error.bhd-01539_description: Error Message in Notification/Sharing process: Informs the user that some specified BCC recipients are not recognized as internal users. This message appears as a validation error or warning when a user attempts to send notifications or share content.
error.bhd-01540: Some recipients are not in whitelist
error.bhd-01540_description: Error message in the BMC Helix Dashboards notification system: Informs the user that some specified recipients for a notification are not approved according to the system's whitelist. This message prevents notifications from being sent to unauthorized recipients.
error.bhd-01541: Some BCC recipients are not in whitelist
error.bhd-01541_description: Error message in email or notification configuration: Informs the user that some BCC recipients specified for a scheduled report or alert are not allowed by the system's whitelist.
error.bhd-01542_description: Error Message in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message informs the user that the system failed to retrieve or load report data. It appears when reports cannot be fetched, for example, due to network issues or backend service problems.
error.bhd-01543_description: Error message in an error notification within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that they cannot save or create an FTP configuration because an identical configuration already exists in the system.
error.bhd-01544_description: Error message in an error notification: Informs the user that an attempt to add an FTP configuration, likely after submitting a form, has failed.
error.bhd-01545_description: Error Message in a notification banner or dialog: This message informs the user that an attempt to save or update the FTP configuration settings within BMC Helix Dashboards has failed.
error.bhd-01546: bad request data while getting preview
error.bhd-01546_description: Error Message in BMC Helix Dashboards error notifications: Informs the user that the system encountered invalid request data while trying to generate a preview, preventing the preview from being displayed.
error.bhd-01547: Default FTP configuration deletion is not allowed!
error.bhd-01547_description: Error message in the UI notification area: Informs the user that the system's default FTP configuration cannot be deleted. This prevents the removal of essential system settings.
error.bhd-01548: FTP is used in report scheduler
error.bhd-01548_description: Error Message in Report Scheduler configuration: Informs the user that an attempted action (e.g., disabling or removing an FTP configuration) cannot be completed because FTP is currently utilized by scheduled reports.
error.bhd-01549_description: Error message in a notification or alert area: Appears when a user's attempt to delete an existing FTP configuration within BMC Helix Dashboards fails. This message informs the user about the unsuccessful operation.
error.bhd-01550: Failed to delete report schedules for the org.
error.bhd-01550_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an attempt to delete report schedules for their organization was unsuccessful. This message typically appears after a user tries to remove existing scheduled reports.
error.bhd-01551: Failed to disable report schedules for the org.
error.bhd-01551_description: Error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an attempt to disable existing report schedules for the current organization failed. This message appears when a system or permission error prevents the completion of this administrative action.
error.bhd-01552: Failed to connect to FTP server
error.bhd-01552_description: Error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the application was unable to establish a connection with a specified FTP server. This might occur during data transfer operations or when configuring an FTP-related feature.
error.bhd-01601: bad request data while updating signed in user
error.bhd-01601_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards UI: Notifies the user that an update to their own signed-in user profile or settings failed due to invalid or malformed data in the request. This appears as an error notification.
error.bhd-01602: Not allowed to change email when auth proxy is using email property
error.bhd-01602_description: Error message in User Profile or Account Settings: Informs the user that they cannot change their email address because an external authentication proxy is configured to manage it.
error.bhd-01603: Not allowed to change username when auth proxy is using username property
error.bhd-01603_description: Error message in user profile or administration settings: Informs the user that their username cannot be changed because an authentication proxy is currently configured to manage the username property.
error.bhd-01604_description: Error message in a notification or form validation context: Informs the user that the provided email address is not in a valid format. This message is displayed when an email input fails validation.
error.bhd-01605_description: Error message in the notification area of BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a submitted or referenced identifier is invalid. This typically occurs when an ID (e.g., for a dashboard, data source, or user) is incorrectly formatted or does not exist within the system.
error.bhd-01606: Only users and service accounts can star dashboards
error.bhd-01606_description: Error message in the dashboard interface: Informs the user that only user accounts and service accounts have permission to mark dashboards as favorites ("star" them). This message appears when an unauthorized account type attempts to star a dashboard.
error.bhd-01607_description: Error message in the notification system during a dashboard-related operation: Informs the user that the unique identifier (UID) provided for a dashboard is invalid or does not correspond to an existing dashboard.
error.bhd-01608_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the provided or accessed organization ID is invalid. This error occurs when the system attempts to use an unrecognized or incorrectly formatted organization ID.
error.bhd-01609: Only users and service accounts get starred dashboards
error.bhd-01609_description: Error message in a notification banner: This message is displayed when an entity attempts to star a dashboard but lacks the required user or service account privileges. It clarifies that only actual user accounts and designated service accounts are permitted to mark dashboards as favorites.
error.bhd-01610: bad request data while changing the password for the user
error.bhd-01610_description: Error message displayed as a notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message indicates that the data provided in a password change request for a user was invalid or malformed. It typically signifies an issue with the parameters sent to the backend API during the password update process.
error.bhd-01611: bad request data while revoking the auth token
error.bhd-01611_description: Error message in notification area: Informs the user that an attempt to revoke an authentication token failed because the data provided in the request was invalid or malformed. This message helps diagnose issues related to the revocation process.
error.bhd-01612: bad request data while updating the user
error.bhd-01612_description: Error message in a notification banner or pop-up: Informs the user (or administrator) that an attempt to update a user's information failed because the provided data in the request was invalid or malformed.
error.bhd-01613_description: Error Message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Displayed when a user or system process attempts to use an organization that is not recognized or valid within the system.
error.bhd-01614: entity not allowed to revoke tokens
error.bhd-01614_description: Error message in a UI notification: Informs the user that the current entity (e.g., user, service, or application) does not have the necessary permissions to revoke tokens. This indicates an authorization failure.
error.bhd-01615: entity not allowed to get tokens
error.bhd-01615_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Notifies the user that an entity (e.g., a user or a service account) attempted to acquire authentication or authorization tokens but was denied due to insufficient permissions. This typically indicates a security or access rights configuration issue preventing a requested operation.
error.bhd-01616_description: Error message in a system notification: Informs the user that a requested endpoint is only accessible to authenticated users. This message appears when an unauthorized access attempt is made.
error.bhd-01617: Update would result in user login conflict
error.bhd-01617_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Displayed when an attempted update, such as to user settings or authentication configurations, is blocked because it would lead to an inconsistency or conflict with existing user login sessions. This prevents disruption to user access and maintains system integrity.
error.bhd-01618_description: Error message in an error notification within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an attempt to retrieve or access user information has failed. This message indicates a system error when trying to fetch user data.
error.bhd-01620_description: Error message in the notification area of BMC Helix Dashboards: This informs the user that the system was unable to retrieve their associated organizations. This typically occurs during user session initialization, profile loading, or when filtering access based on organizational data.
error.bhd-01621_description: Error message in notification area: Informs the user about a failure to retrieve their designated favorite items. 'User stars' refers to user-marked favorites, such as dashboards or reports.
error.bhd-01622_description: Error message in the notification area of BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the application failed to retrieve or load the available dashboards from the server.
error.bhd-01623_description: Error message in a notification banner or pop-up within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the attempt to mark a dashboard as a favorite has failed. This message is displayed when a user tries to "star" a dashboard and the operation is unsuccessful.
error.bhd-01624_description: Error message in a notification pop-up or banner in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that their attempt to remove a dashboard from their favorites (unstar it) was unsuccessful.
error.bhd-01625_description: Error message in a notification area in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an attempt to change a user's password was unsuccessful. This message is displayed when a password change operation fails.
error.bhd-01626_description: Error message in the notification area: Informs the user that the system was unable to retrieve the organization's quotas or limits. This error typically suggests a backend or network issue preventing the data retrieval.
error.bhd-01627_description: Error message in a notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an attempt to update a 'help flag' has failed. This flag likely controls the visibility of in-app help, tutorials, or onboarding guides.
error.bhd-01628_description: Error Message in the notification display area within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system failed to generate an email required for a verification process (e.g., account confirmation or password reset). This indicates a system-level failure during an automated email generation task.
error.bhd-01629_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog within BMC Helix Dashboards: This message informs the user that the system encountered an error while trying to parse or extract a user identifier. This typically occurs during operations requiring user identification, such as login, authentication, or data processing.
error.bhd-01630_description: Error message in the UI notification system: Informs the user or administrator that the system failed to retrieve the teams associated with a user. This error occurs when an operation requiring user team data could not complete successfully.
error.bhd-01631_description: Error message in an error notification: Informs the user that an operation to update a user's details or settings was unsuccessful.
error.bhd-01632_description: Error Message in the notification system within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs that the system failed to correctly interpret or extract a user identifier from its expected format. This typically occurs during authentication, data retrieval, or other user-related processing.
error.bhd-01640_description: Error message in a notification banner within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an attempted user lookup or authentication failed because the specified user does not exist.
error.bhd-01641_description: Error message in an error notification: Informs the user that their authentication token is missing. This typically occurs when a user's session has expired or they are not logged in.
error.bhd-01642_description: Error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that their attempt to change the active organization failed. This typically appears after a user tries to switch contexts or organizations.
error.bhd-01643: Failed to revoke user auth token
error.bhd-01643_description: Notification Error Message in the system's notification area: Informs the user (or administrator) that the system failed to invalidate or revoke a user's authentication token. This typically occurs after an attempt to log out a user or terminate their session.
error.bhd-01644: Failed to get user auth token
error.bhd-01644_description: Error message in a notification or alert within BMC Helix Dashboards: Displays when the system fails to retrieve a user's authentication token. This typically prevents the user from logging in or accessing authorized functionalities.
error.bhd-01645: Cannot revoke active user auth token
error.bhd-01645_description: Error message in a system notification within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs an administrator or user that an authentication token cannot be revoked while it is actively in use.
error.bhd-01701: bad request data while creating new user
error.bhd-01701_description: Error message in a notification banner/dialog: Informs the user that the data provided when attempting to create a new user account was invalid. This prevents the user creation from succeeding.
error.bhd-01702: bad request data while revoking auth token for user
error.bhd-01702_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog: Notifies the user or administrator that the system failed to revoke an authentication token for a user because the request data it received was invalid or malformed. This indicates a backend issue with the token revocation process.
error.bhd-01703: bad request data while setting permissions for the user
error.bhd-01703_description: Error message in notification/error banner: Informs the user that an attempt to set or modify user permissions failed because the request data provided was invalid or malformed. This indicates a problem with the input sent to the system when updating user access rights.
error.bhd-01704: bad request data while setting password for user
error.bhd-01704_description: Error message in system notification: Informs the user that their attempt to set a password failed because the system received invalid or malformed data in the request.
error.bhd-01705: Password is missing or too short
error.bhd-01705_description: Notification error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the entered password is either missing or does not meet the minimum length requirements. This message prompts the user to provide a valid password.
error.bhd-01706_description: Error message in an error notification: Informs the user that a provided ID (identifier) is invalid. This typically occurs when a user enters an ID that doesn't meet validation rules or refers to a non-existent entity.
error.bhd-01707_description: Error message in User Interface: Notifies the user that they are unable to log out of their current session. This message is displayed when there are specific system or administrative constraints preventing self-logout.
error.bhd-01708_description: Error message in a notification dialog or banner: This message is displayed when a user attempts to remove the last existing Grafana administrator, preventing the system from being left without an admin.
error.bhd-01709_description: Error message in a notification banner: Informs the user that the system could not find a specified user. This typically appears when a user attempts an action (e.g., login, search, assignment) with a user account that does not exist.
error.bhd-01710: Not allowed to reset password when login form is disabled
error.bhd-01710_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that they cannot reset their password because the system's login form has been disabled. This typically indicates an administrative setting preventing login or password changes.
error.bhd-01711: Cannot change Grafana Admin role for externally synced user
error.bhd-01711_description: Error Message in System Notification: Informs the user that the Grafana Administrator role cannot be modified for a user whose identity is synchronized from an external source. This restriction is in place to maintain consistency with external identity management systems.
error.bhd-01712_description: Error message in a notification banner: Informs the user that an attempt to authorize or save settings was unsuccessful due to insufficient user permissions.
error.bhd-01713: User has conflicting login or email with another user. Please contact server admin
error.bhd-01713_description: Error message in the user management or account creation/update process in BMC Helix Dashboards: It notifies a user that their login or email conflicts with an existing user's details, preventing the operation. The user is instructed to contact the server administrator for resolution.
error.bhd-01714: Failed to get admin stats from database
error.bhd-01714_description: Error message in a system notification within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs an administrator that the system failed to retrieve administrative statistics from the database, indicating an internal system or database issue.
error.bhd-01715: Failed to get anon stats from database
error.bhd-01715_description: Error message in a system notification or error dialog: Informs the user that the application failed to retrieve anonymous statistics from the database. This typically points to a database connectivity issue or an internal problem with gathering telemetry data.
error.bhd-01716_description: Error message in a notification area in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an operation to re-encrypt data keys has failed. This typically occurs during security-related tasks like key rotation or data migration.
error.bhd-01717_description: Error message in a system notification: Informs the user or administrator that the system failed to rotate data encryption keys, indicating an internal security or system management issue.
error.bhd-01718_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog: Informs the user that an attempt to create a new user account failed. This message is displayed when an administrative action to provision a new user within BMC Helix Dashboards is unsuccessful.
error.bhd-01719: Could not read user from database
error.bhd-01719_description: Error Message in a notification area: Informs the user that the system failed to read necessary user data from the database. This typically prevents operations requiring user profile access or validation.
error.bhd-01720_description: Error message in a UI notification: Informs the user that the system failed to update their password. This message is displayed when a password change operation encounters an error.
error.bhd-01721_description: Error message in a notification banner or modal dialog: Informs the user that an attempt to update user permissions was unsuccessful.
error.bhd-01722_description: Error message in a notification banner or dialog: Informs the user that an operation to delete a user account was unsuccessful. This message appears in BMC Helix Dashboards.
error.bhd-01723_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards notifications: This message is displayed when the system fails to disable an external user account. It informs the user that the requested action could not be completed successfully.
error.bhd-01724_description: Error message in a notification or alert area: Informs the user that the attempt to disable a user account was unsuccessful. This message is displayed when a user management operation fails.
error.bhd-01725_description: Error message in the notification area of BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the system was unable to successfully enable or activate an external user account. This message appears when an attempt to modify an external user's status to enabled fails.
error.bhd-01726_description: Error notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message is displayed when the system encounters an issue and fails to enable a user account, typically during user management operations.
error.bhd-01727_description: Error message in an error notification: This message is displayed when the system fails to retrieve required user information from the backend. It indicates an issue with fetching user data.
error.bhd-01728: Failed to get user auth tokens
error.bhd-01728_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message is displayed when the system fails to retrieve the necessary authentication tokens for a user. It indicates a problem preventing successful user authentication or session validation.
error.bhd-01729_description: Error message in the BMC Helix Dashboards notification system: Informs the user or administrator that an attempt to log out a user was unsuccessful. This specific error (BHD-01729) indicates a system issue preventing successful user logout.
error.bhd-01730: User password updated but unable to revoke user sessions
error.bhd-01730_description: Error message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Notifies the user that a password update was successful, but the system encountered an error when attempting to revoke existing user sessions. This informs the user of a partial success and a potential security oversight.
error.bhd-01740_description: Error message in a system notification: Informs the user that an operation to re-encrypt sensitive configuration data (secrets) has failed. This typically occurs during system updates or security-related configuration changes.
error.bhd-01741_description: Error message in an error notification: Displayed when an attempt to update the resource quotas or limits for an organization within BMC Helix Dashboards fails.
error.bhd-01742_description: Error message in a notification or error display: Informs the user that an attempt to revert sensitive configuration data (secrets) to a previous state has failed. This error typically occurs during configuration management or system recovery processes.
error.bhd-01746_description: Error message in a system notification or error display area: Informs the user that the application failed to reload the configurations for its plugins. This typically points to an issue with the plugin files or a backend service.

success.bhd-00001_description: Success Notification Message in the BMC Helix Dashboards UI: Confirms that data fields, such as those in a form or configuration, have been updated and saved successfully.
success.bhd-00002_description: Success notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Appears after a user action to confirm the successful deletion of one or more fields. The `(s)` in "Field(s)" indicates it handles both singular and plural deletions.
success.bhd-00003_description: Success message in a notification banner in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a new field has been successfully created.
success.bhd-00101_description: Success notification message displayed after a user updates their preferences or settings in BMC Helix Dashboards: It confirms that the changes have been successfully saved.
success.bhd-00224_description: Success Notification Message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a folder has been successfully deleted. This message confirms the successful completion of a user action.
success.bhd-00225_description: Notification message in the Dashboard UI notification area: Informs the user that folder permissions have been successfully updated. This confirms the successful completion of a user's action.
success.bhd-00329_description: Success message on screen: Informs the user that modifications to a dashboard's access permissions have been successfully applied. This confirms the update operation was successful.
success.bhd-00330: changes were broadcast to the gitops listener
success.bhd-00330_description: Success Notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message confirms that configuration changes have been successfully broadcast to the GitOps listener, initiating the GitOps synchronization process.
success.bhd-00413_description: Library element in Dashboards Library: This success notification confirms that a library element has been successfully deleted by the user.
success.bhd-00511: Snapshot deleted. It might take an hour before it's cleared from any CDN caches.
success.bhd-00607_description: Success notification message in a UI notification area: This message is displayed to inform the user that they have successfully logged into BMC Helix Dashboards.
success.bhd-00749_description: Success message in a notification banner: Informs the user that an organization's details or settings have been successfully updated after a user action.
success.bhd-00750_description: Success message in a UI notification banner/toast: Informs the user that an address record has been successfully updated within BMC Helix Dashboards.
success.bhd-00751_description: Success notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards, likely appearing as a toast or banner: Informs an administrator that a user has been successfully added to an organization.
success.bhd-00752_description: Success message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Confirms the successful update of an organization user's details, displayed after an administrative action.
success.bhd-00753_description: Success Notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message informs the user that an organization's resource quota or usage limit has been successfully updated. It confirms the successful completion of an administrative action related to organizational settings.
success.bhd-00754_description: Success notification message in the UI: Informs the user that a user account has been successfully deleted from the system.
success.bhd-00755_description: Success message in a notification banner: Informs the user that an organization has been successfully deleted.
success.bhd-00756_description: Success notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a new organization has been successfully created. This message is displayed upon the successful completion of the organization creation process.
success.bhd-00757_description: Success notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an invitation has been successfully revoked or withdrawn. This message appears after a user initiates an action to revoke an existing invitation.
success.bhd-00758_description: Success message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Confirms that a configuration change has been successfully applied.
success.bhd-00759_description: Success message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a configuration setting has been successfully reverted to its default values. This message confirms the successful completion of a user action.
success.bhd-00760_description: Success notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards UI: Confirms that a user has been successfully removed from an organization. This message is displayed to an administrator or authorized user after the action is completed.
success.bhd-00810_description: Success message in notification banner: Indicates that user permissions or object permissions have been successfully updated.
success.bhd-00811_description: Success message in a notification banner: Confirms that permissions have been successfully updated.
success.bhd-00812_description: Success notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a permission has been successfully removed. This message appears after an administrative action.
success.bhd-00933_description: Success notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a data source has been successfully added.
success.bhd-00934_description: Success message in the notification system: Informs the user that a datasource configuration has been successfully updated. This confirms the successful completion of a user's action to modify or save a datasource.
success.bhd-00935_description: Success message in a notification displayed in BMC Helix Dashboards: Confirms to the user that a data source has been successfully deleted from the system.
success.bhd-00948_description: Notification message in the success notification area of BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a correlation has been successfully created. This message confirms the successful completion of an action to establish a correlation.
success.bhd-00949_description: Success notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a correlation has been successfully deleted.
success.bhd-00950_description: Success Notification Message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a correlation setting or configuration has been successfully updated. This message confirms the successful modification of data correlation parameters within the dashboard.
success.bhd-01010_description: Success Message in the notification area of BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a query has been successfully deleted.
success.bhd-01118_description: Success notification displayed in the application UI: Informs the user that changes made to plugin settings have been successfully saved. It confirms the successful completion of an update operation.
success.bhd-01220_description: Success message in the BMC Helix Dashboards interface: Confirms that a user's action to add an annotation was successful. It is typically displayed as a temporary toast or banner notification.
success.bhd-01221_description: Success Notification Message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Confirms that an annotation has been successfully updated. This message appears after a user successfully edits or modifies an existing annotation on a dashboard or panel.
success.bhd-01222_description: Success Message in the notification area: Informs the user that an annotation has been successfully updated or modified in BMC Helix Dashboards.
success.bhd-01223_description: Success notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a Graphite annotation has been successfully added to a dashboard or panel.
success.bhd-01224_description: Success notification message in the UI: Informs the user that an annotation has been successfully deleted.
success.bhd-01353_description: Notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a specific feature or action is not yet implemented. The 'success' categorization for this notification type is notable, suggesting it might be a temporary placeholder or an acknowledgment that the information has been successfully delivered.
success.bhd-01354_description: Success Message in the notification area of BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that their personalized data has been successfully deleted. This message confirms the completion of a user action to remove personal data.
success.bhd-01356_description: Success message in a notification banner or toast: Confirms that an access attempt or authorization process was successful. The Spanish translation ('Acceso no autorizado') currently states 'Unauthorized access', which contradicts the English and other translations and should be reviewed.
success.bhd-01357_description: Success notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that permissions have been successfully updated after a relevant action.
success.bhd-01358_description: Success notification message in the User Management interface: Confirms that a user-role mapping has been successfully created. This message is displayed to the administrator after adding a new role assignment for a user.
success.bhd-01359: User role mapping removed for all roles.
success.bhd-01359_description: Success notification message in the UI: Confirms that all user role mappings have been successfully removed for a specific user or set of users. This indicates that the affected user(s) no longer have any roles assigned.
success.bhd-01361_description: Notification message in a success notification banner: Informs the user that a team role has been successfully added. It confirms the successful completion of an administrative action.
success.bhd-01362_description: Success Notification Message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a team role has been successfully removed. This message is displayed to confirm the completion of an administrative action related to team role management.
success.bhd-01363_description: Success Notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that their preferred language or regional settings have been successfully updated. This message appears after a user saves changes to their locale preferences.
success.bhd-01553_description: Success Message in a success notification: Informs the user that a report has been successfully created. This message confirms the successful completion of a user action.
success.bhd-01554_description: Success message in the report management interface within BMC Helix Dashboards: Confirms to the user that a report they were working on has been successfully updated or saved.
success.bhd-01555_description: Success Notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a selected report has been successfully deleted.
success.bhd-01556_description: Success Message in a notification banner/pop-up: Confirms to the user that one or more reports have been successfully deleted. This message is displayed after a user initiates a report deletion action.
success.bhd-01557_description: Success notification in a banner: Confirms the successful removal of a user's association with reports. This message appears after an action to manage report access.
success.bhd-01558_description: Notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Confirms that a user's changes to the FTP configuration settings have been successfully saved.
success.bhd-01559_description: Success message in FTP Configuration settings within BMC Helix Dashboards: Confirms to the user that changes made to the FTP configuration have been saved successfully.
success.bhd-01560_description: Success notification message in the application UI: Confirms to the user that FTP has been successfully configured as the default setting or method. This typically appears after the user saves their configuration changes.
success.bhd-01561_description: Success notification message in the application UI: Confirms the successful deletion of an FTP configuration. It appears after a user initiates and completes the removal of an FTP configuration.
success.bhd-01562_description: Success notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Notifies the user that the deletion or disabling of report schedules has been successfully completed. This message appears after the user performs the corresponding action.
success.bhd-01563_description: Success Notification Message in the Dashboard UI: Informs the user that a specific report has been successfully enabled. This message appears after a user initiates the action to enable a report.
success.bhd-01564_description: Success message in a notification banner in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the action to enable reports has been completed successfully.
success.bhd-01565_description: Success message in a notification banner/pop-up in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message is displayed to confirm to the user that a selected report has been successfully disabled.
success.bhd-01566_description: Success message in a UI notification: Informs the user that their action to disable reports has been successfully completed.
success.bhd-01567_description: Confirmation message in the Report Branding section: Informs the user that their updates to the report's branding settings have been successfully saved. This message appears after a user attempts to modify and save report branding options.
success.bhd-01568: Report branding is set to default.
success.bhd-01568_description: Success notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the report branding has been successfully reset or configured to its default settings.
success.bhd-01569_description: Success message in a notification banner: Confirms to the user that an item, setting, or configuration has been successfully updated.
success.bhd-01570_description: Success message in a notification UI element (e.g., toast or banner) within BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an item or resource has been successfully deleted.
success.bhd-01571_description: **Success message** in **application-wide notifications**: Informs the user that a requested action or operation has completed successfully. This generic message confirms the successful execution of various tasks within the system.
success.bhd-01633_description: Success Notification Message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that the active organization they are currently working within has been successfully changed. This message confirms a user action and is typically transient.
success.bhd-01634_description: Success notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Confirms to the user that a dashboard has been successfully marked as a favorite. This message typically appears temporarily after the starring action is completed.
success.bhd-01635_description: Success message in the Global UI notification area: Confirms that a dashboard has been successfully removed from the user's starred or favorite list. This message appears after the user takes action to unstar a dashboard.
success.bhd-01636_description: Notification message in the UI notification system: Confirms that a user's password has been successfully updated.
success.bhd-01637_description: Notification message in a success notification: Informs the user that an action to set a specific 'help flag' was completed successfully. This 'help flag' likely refers to a system setting or user preference related to displaying help information or enabling a help-related feature.
success.bhd-01638_description: Success message in a notification banner or toast: Informs the user that a user's information or details have been successfully updated or saved.
success.bhd-01639_description: Success message in Application UI: Notifies the user that an email required for verification has been successfully sent. This typically follows an action like account registration or password reset where email verification is a subsequent step.
success.bhd-01646_description: Success notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an authentication token for a user has been successfully revoked. This typically appears after an administrative action or a security-related event.
success.bhd-01731_description: Notification message in a success banner or toast: Informs the user that a password update operation, either for their own account or another user's, was successfully completed.
success.bhd-01732_description: Success notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that an update to user permissions was successfully applied.
success.bhd-01733_description: Success message in a notification banner: Confirms that a user has been successfully deleted from the system.
success.bhd-01734_description: Success notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message confirms that an administrator has successfully disabled a user account. The 'success' in the key path refers to the completion of the disable action.
success.bhd-01735_description: Success message in the notification area: Informs the user that a user account has been successfully enabled. This confirms the successful completion of an administrative action.
success.bhd-01736_description: Success message in a notification banner: Confirms to the user that they have successfully logged out of BMC Helix Dashboards.
success.bhd-01737_description: Success notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Confirms that a new user account has been successfully created. This message is displayed after a user creation operation.
success.bhd-01748_description: Success notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: Confirms that an organization's quota has been successfully updated. This message is displayed after a user or administrator modifies the quota settings.
success.bhd-01753_description: Success notification in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message confirms that the dashboard configuration has been successfully reloaded, typically after a user-initiated refresh or system update.
success.bhd-01754_description: Success notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Confirms the successful reloading of plugin configurations. This message typically appears after an administrative action or system update.
success.bhd-01755_description: Success notification message in Application notifications: Confirms that the data sources' configuration has been successfully reloaded. This message appears after a user action or system event that updates datasource settings.
success.bhd-01756_description: Success notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Confirms that the system's alerting configuration has been successfully reloaded. This message appears after a user action or an automated process that triggers a refresh of alert settings.

dashboard.imported_description: Notification message in the BMC Helix Dashboards application: Informs the user that a dashboard has been successfully imported. This message typically appears as a toast or within a notification center.
dashboard.panel-not-found_description: Notification message in a dashboard environment: Informs the user that a requested or expected dashboard panel could not be found. This often indicates a missing, deleted, or inaccessible panel.
dashboard.restored_description: Notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards: This message confirms to the user that a dashboard has been successfully restored to a previous state.
dashboard.restored-failed_description: Notification message in the BMC Helix Dashboards notification system: Informs the user that an attempt to restore a dashboard has failed. This message indicates an issue preventing the dashboard from being successfully restored to a previous state.
dashboard.restored-version_description: Notification message in the Dashboard's Notifications section: Informs the user that a dashboard has been restored to a previous version. The `{{version}}` placeholder will be dynamically replaced with the specific version number or identifier.
dashboard.restored-version-failed_description: Notification message in the Dashboard UI: This message is displayed to the user when an attempt to restore a dashboard to a specific previous version fails. It informs the user about the unsuccessful operation.

error.error-text_description: Generic error message in the BMC Helix Dashboards notification system: This text is displayed to indicate that an error has occurred.
error.failed-validation_description: Error message in Error notification: Informs the user that an operation or input failed a validation check.
error.generate-link_description: Error message displayed as a notification: Informs the user that the system encountered an issue and was unable to generate a shortened link. This error typically appears when a user tries to create a shareable, condensed URL for a dashboard or report.
error.http-error_description: Error message in error notifications: Informs the user about a generic HTTP error that has occurred. The `{{msg}}` placeholder will be replaced with specific details about the HTTP error.
error.unknown-error_description: Error Message in BMC Helix Dashboards notifications: Informs the user that an unexpected and unspecified error has occurred, typically when a notification action or process fails.

folder.created_description: Notification message in the notifications section related to folder actions: Informs the user that a new folder has been successfully created.
folder.failed-creation_description: Notification message in the folder management area: Informs the user that the system was unable to create a new folder.

settings.saved_description: Confirmation message in the Notification Settings section: Indicates that changes made to the user's notification preferences have been successfully saved.
settings.saved-failed_description: Error message in Notifications settings: Displayed when an attempt to save changes to notification settings is unsuccessful.

success.copied-link_description: Success notification message in BMC Helix Dashboards: Informs the user that a shortened link has been successfully copied to their clipboard. This message typically appears as a temporary toast or banner.
success.success-text_description: Text label in a success notification message: Indicates that an action or operation has been completed successfully.

org-custom-config.community_description: Label in Organization Custom Configuration: Denotes a section or a link related to the user community, its features, or shared resources within the custom configuration settings for BMC Helix Dashboards.
org-custom-config.documentation_description: Link in the Organization Custom Configuration section: Provides access to relevant documentation for configuring an organization's settings.

errors.query-type-mandatory: At least one query type should be enabled
errors.query-type-mandatory_description: Error message in the Organization Custom Configuration settings: This message is displayed when a user attempts to save a configuration without enabling at least one query type. It enforces a minimum selection requirement for query types.

org-custom-config.support_description: Link in the Org Custom Config section: Provides access to support resources or contact information for the user.
org-custom-config.video_description: Option label in the organization's custom configuration settings: This label identifies a setting or section for managing video-related preferences, features, or content for the organization.

bmc-video.enter-video_description: Button in the BMC Video panel: This action allows the user to initiate the process of adding or inputting an embedded video, likely by providing a URL or embed code.
bmc-video.invalid-url_description: Validation message in the BMC Video panel: Displayed when a user attempts to save or input a video URL that is not recognized as valid.
bmc-video.url_description: Label for an input field in the BMC Video panel configuration: This field allows users to specify the URL of the video to be displayed within the panel.

bmc-welcome.communities_description: Link in the BMC Welcome panel: Directs users to online communities or forums for BMC products.
bmc-welcome.community-description_description: Label in the Welcome Panel: This label identifies a section or field where a description of the community is provided.
bmc-welcome.default-community-description: Connect. Share. Discover. Join discussions with peers and experts on BMC products and solutions.
bmc-welcome.default-documentation-description: Go through the product documentation to understand all the Reporting features and how to use them.
bmc-welcome.default-documentation-description_descri: Instructional text in the BMC Welcome Panel: Guides users to the product documentation for understanding all reporting features and their usage.
bmc-welcome.default-video-description: View video how-tos, overviews, and demos about BMC products and solutions on the BMC YouTube channel.
bmc-welcome.documentation_description: Link in the BMC Welcome panel: Provides users with access to product documentation and help resources for BMC Helix Dashboards.
bmc-welcome.documentation-description_description: A label in the BMC Welcome panel: It introduces the description text for documentation content or links displayed on the panel.
bmc-welcome.logo-title_description: Logo Title in the BMC Welcome panel: Identifies the BMC Helix brand logo. This text likely serves as a visual title or accessibility label for the logo element.
bmc-welcome.video-description_description: Label in the Welcome panel: Provides a brief explanation or summary for a video, likely within an informational or introductory section.
bmc-welcome.videos_description: Label on the Welcome panel: It signifies a link or section where users can access helpful videos, such as tutorials or product introductions for BMC Helix Dashboards.

playlist.empty: Playlist is empty. Add dashboards below.
playlist.items-changed_one: Playlist items changed. There is {{count}} dashboard in playlist now.
playlist.items-changed_other: Playlist items changed. There are {{count}} dashboards in playlist now.

query.query-name-label_description: Label in the Query configuration within BMC Helix Dashboards: This label prompts the user to enter or view the name of a specific query. It typically precedes an input field where the query name is defined.

common.all_description: Option in a common Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) section: Allows users to select or refer to all available entities, such as users, roles, or permissions.
common.assigned_description: Status label in common RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) interfaces: Indicates that an entity (e.g., a user, role, or permission) has been allocated or associated.
common.menu_description: Menu element in the common BMC RBAC interface: Provides a navigation menu for accessing various Role-Based Access Control functionalities.
common.name: Name

admin.datasource-manage_description: Permission in the RBAC Admin Permissions section: This permission allows administrators to manage data sources.
admin.datasource-manage-desc_description: Permission description in the RBAC administrative settings: This string describes a permission that grants the ability to manage datasources.
admin.reports-manage_description: Permission in the Admin permissions section of BMC Helix Dashboards RBAC: This permission grants the ability to manage the scheduling of reports. This includes creating, editing, and deleting scheduled report configurations.
admin.reports-manage-desc_description: Permission description in the administrator role's RBAC settings: This text describes the capability of an administrator to manage all reports.
admin.title: Administration
admin.title_description: Section Title in the RBAC permissions management interface: It labels the area for configuring and managing administrative settings related to permissions.

calc-fields.create-desc: can create or update calculated fields
calc-fields.create-desc_description: Permission description in RBAC settings for Calculated Fields: Describes the capability to create or update calculated fields. This text helps administrators understand the scope of the permission when configuring user roles.
calc-fields.view-desc_description: Permission string in RBAC permissions settings for Calculated Fields: Describes the capability for a user to view calculated fields.

common.view_description: Permission option in RBAC Permissions management: Grants users the ability to view or display specific resources or data without modification rights.

dashboards.create-desc_description: Permission option description in the Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) settings for Dashboards: It describes the ability for a user or role to create new dashboards.
dashboards.download-desc_description: Permission description in Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) settings for dashboards: Explains that a user with this permission can download dashboards as PDF, XLSX, or CSV files. This text helps administrators understand what capabilities are granted by this specific permission when configuring user roles.
dashboards.view-desc_description: Permission description in the RBAC permission settings for dashboards: Specifies the ability of a user or role to view dashboards for which they have been granted access.

datasource.explore_description: Permission label in the Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) settings for a data source: Grants the user the ability to interact with, query, or view data from that specific data source.
datasource.explore-desc: can use explore mode for datasources
datasource.explore-desc_description: Permission description in the RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) settings for datasources: This text specifies that a user or role can utilize the "explore mode" functionality for any configured datasource.

datasources.title: Datasources
datasources.title_description: Section Title in the RBAC Permissions management area: This title identifies the section dedicated to managing access permissions for data sources.

permissions.drawer-title_description: Drawer Title in the RBAC Permissions section: Displays the permissions associated with a specific entity. The `{{name}}` placeholder dynamically indicates the name of the entity whose permissions are being managed or viewed.

folders.create-desc_description: Permission description in RBAC permissions for folders: This label describes a user's ability to create new folders within the system. It indicates a specific permission granted to a role.
folders.title: Folders
folders.title_description: The title of a section in the Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) Permissions interface: It designates the area where users manage or view access permissions related to folders.
folders.view-desc_description: Permission description in Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) settings for folders: This string describes the capability for a user or role to view dashboard folders they are explicitly granted access to.

insightfinder.access_description: Checkbox label in the RBAC permissions section for InsightFinder: This string indicates the permission to access the InsightFinder module. It grants a user the ability to view and interact with InsightFinder's features.
insightfinder.access-desc-tooltip_description: Tooltip description in the RBAC permissions settings for the Insight Finder feature: Explains the ability granted by a specific permission, allowing a user to access the Insight Finder.
insightfinder.dashboards-create_description: Permission in RBAC permissions for InsightFinder: This setting grants or revokes the ability for a user to create new dashboards within the InsightFinder module.
insightfinder.dashboards-create-desc: can create dashboards through insight finder
insightfinder.dashboards-create-desc_description: Permission description in the RBAC settings for the Insight Finder module: This text explains that a user role with this permission can create dashboards via the Insight Finder tool.
insightfinder.title: Insight Finder
insightfinder.title_description: Title in the Insight Finder permissions section: Identifies the interface for managing access rights and roles specifically for the Insight Finder feature.

reports.access_description: Permission label in the RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) settings for reports: This indicates the ability for a user or role to access, view, or manage reports.
reports.access-desc_description: **Permission description** in the **Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) permissions settings for reports**: This string describes a specific access level, indicating that a user or role has the capability to both view and create reports. It is typically displayed as an option or label when assigning permissions.
reports.history-read_description: Permission label in RBAC permissions for reports: This permission allows users to view the history associated with reports.
reports.history-read-desc_description: Permission in RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) permissions for Reports: Grants a user the ability to view the dedicated history section for reports within BMC Helix Dashboards.
reports.recipients-dash-access_description: Permission option in Report permissions management (RBAC): Specifies a method to define report and dashboard recipients whose access is determined dynamically.
reports.recipients-dash-access-desc: Can add recipients dynamically from dashboard in schedule
reports.recipients-dash-access-desc_description: Permission description in RBAC settings for reports: This permission determines if a user can dynamically add recipients from a dashboard when setting up a schedule for report or dashboard delivery.
reports.settings-read_description: Permission label in the Reports permissions section of RBAC: This grants users the ability to view settings related to reports.
reports.settings-read-desc_description: Permission option in the RBAC Permissions section for Reports: Defines the ability for a user role to view the configuration settings related to reports.
reports.title: Reports
reports.title_description: Section Title in the BMC Helix Dashboards RBAC Permissions management area: This title identifies the dedicated section for configuring or viewing permissions related to reports.

servicemanagement-querytypes.sql-desc_description: Permission description in the Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) settings for Service Management query types: Describes the ability for a user role to edit SQL queries.
servicemanagement-querytypes.title: Service management query types
servicemanagement-querytypes.title_description: Section Title in the RBAC permissions configuration for BMC Helix Dashboards: It identifies the category of permissions related to different service management query types.

permissions.subtitle: List of permissions
permissions.subtitle_description: Subtitle in the BMC RBAC Permissions section: It labels a section that displays a list of available permissions.

roles.actions_description: Label in the Roles management section of RBAC: This indicates available operations or tasks that can be performed on or with the listed roles.
roles.custom_description: Label in the Roles section within Role-Based Access Control (RBAC): This option allows administrators to define a custom role with specific permissions. It distinguishes user-created roles from pre-defined system roles.
roles.delete_description: Button in the Roles management section: Initiates the deletion of a specific user role.
roles.delete-confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this role?
roles.delete-confirmation_description: Confirmation prompt in the RBAC Roles management section: Prompts the user to confirm their action when attempting to delete a role. This ensures accidental deletions are prevented.
roles.delete-role_description: Button in the Roles management section within RBAC settings: Initiates the removal of a selected role.
roles.edit_description: Button in the Roles management section of BMC Helix Dashboards: Used to open an interface for modifying an existing user role's properties or permissions.
roles.manage-permissions_description: Label for an action in the Role management section: Clicking this allows users to configure or assign permissions for a selected role.
roles.manage-teams_description: Label in the Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) roles management section: Identifies an action to manage teams. This likely involves associating roles with teams or configuring team-based access.
roles.manage-users_description: Button or link in the RBAC Roles management page: Allows administrators to manage user assignments related to roles.
roles.name-required_description: Validation message in the 'Role name' input field within the RBAC roles management interface: It informs the user that a role name is a mandatory field when creating or editing a role.
roles.new_description: Label in the RBAC Roles management section: Indicates an action (e.g., a button) to create a new user role, or identifies the screen/form for creating a new role.
roles.search_description: Search input field placeholder or button label in the Roles management section within BMC Helix Dashboards: Enables users to find and filter specific roles.
roles.system_description: Role name in the RBAC roles management section: Identifies a predefined system-level role. This role typically grants foundational permissions necessary for the application's operation.

teams.assigned-count_one_description: Count label in the Teams management section within RBAC settings: Displays the singular count of teams assigned to a user, role, or resource. This string is specifically used when the count is exactly one.
teams.assigned-count_other_description: Count display in the RBAC Teams section: Indicates the number of teams that have been assigned roles or other permissions. This string is used for plural counts.
teams.drawer-title_description: Drawer Title in the RBAC Teams section: This title appears on a drawer or panel dedicated to managing or viewing teams for a specified entity. The `{{name}}` placeholder is dynamically populated with the entity's identifier.
teams.none-assigned_description: Empty state message in the Teams management section within Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) settings: Indicates that no teams are currently assigned or configured for a user or specific entity.
teams.none-found_description: Status message in the Teams management section within the RBAC settings: Informs the user that no teams exist or were found during a search or filter operation. It displays when a list of teams is empty.
teams.search_description: Placeholder text in a search field within the Teams management section of RBAC: Guides users to enter a team name to search for specific teams.

users.assigned-count_one_description: Text label in the RBAC Users section: Indicates that a single user has been assigned. This is the singular form for displaying an assigned user count.
users.assigned-count_other_description: Count display in the User Management section of RBAC: Indicates the total number of users who have been assigned roles, groups, or other permissions.
users.drawer-title_description: Drawer title in the RBAC Users management: Displays the name of the role whose associated users are currently being viewed or edited.
users.login_description: Button on the user login screen: Allows users to authenticate and gain access to BMC Helix Dashboards, as part of the Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) system.
users.none-assigned_description: Status message in the RBAC Users management interface: Informs the user when no users are currently assigned to a role, group, or other relevant entity.
users.none-found_description: Message in the Users management screen within the RBAC section: Displayed when no users are found, either because none exist or a search yielded no matching results.

rms.description: Reporting Metadata Studio is a Windows application based on Pentaho Metadata Editor. It is used to create customized views or modify a copy of an out-of-the-box view. For more information, see the online documentation.

download.error_description: Error message in the RMS module during a download operation: Informs the user that the requested download could not be completed.

headers.env-details_description: Header in an RMS section or page: This title introduces content displaying various details related to a specific environment.

search.comfirm-export: Do you want to export the {{dashCount}} selected dashboard(s)?
search.comfirm-export_description: Confirmation prompt in the export confirmation dialog for search results: Asks the user to confirm the export of the specified number of selected dashboards.
search.export_description: Button in Search functionality: Allows users to export the current search results or data displayed within the search context.
search.export-status_description: Label in the Search functionality: Indicates the current status of an export operation. This refers to exports of data initiated from search results.

share-modal.loading_description: Status message in the share modal: Displays while content or options for sharing are being retrieved or processed.

theme-picker.current-theme_description: Label in the theme picker section of the Share Modal: Indicates the theme that is currently active or selected for the shared content.
theme-picker.dark-theme_description: Option label in the theme picker section of the share modal: It represents the choice to apply a dark visual theme to the dashboard or shared content.
theme-picker.light-theme_description: Option in the theme picker within the share modal: This allows users to select a light visual theme for the content being shared.

datetime-format.description: This will change the default time format used in dashboards, panels and reports.
datetime-format.description_description: Description text for a datetime format setting in Shared Preferences: Explains that this setting controls the default time format used in dashboards, panels, and reports.
datetime-format.label: Datetime Format
datetime-format.label_description: Label in the Shared Preferences section: This label identifies the setting that allows users to configure the display format for dates and times within the application.

fields.apply-admins_description: Field label in Shared Preferences: This option allows applying a particular setting or configuration specifically to administrator users. It likely appears as a checkbox or selection.
fields.enabled-query-types_description: **Label or link** in the **Shared Preferences settings, within the Fields section**: This UI element provides functionality to configure which service management query types are enabled and available for use.
fields.query-type-label_description: Label in Shared Preferences settings: Identifies a field where the user can specify the type of query to be used, likely for data retrieval or visualization configurations.
fields.query-type-placeholder_description: Placeholder text in a query type selection field within the BMC Helix Dashboards Shared Preferences section: Prompts the user to choose one of the available query types from a list.

query-type.form_description: Option for Query Type in Shared Preferences: This selection allows users to choose "Form" as the method for constructing a query. This typically refers to a structured, user-friendly input interface for defining query parameters.
query-type.vqb_description: Option label in Shared Preferences (Query Type settings): This identifies "Visual query builder" as a choice for how queries are constructed. It represents a graphical interface for building queries within BMC Helix Dashboards.

tag-filter.remove-tag_description: Button or link in a tag filter component: Allows a user to remove a specific tag from the applied filters. The `{{label}}` represents the name of the tag to be removed.

toggle-feature.manage-features_description: Link in the 'Toggle Feature' section: Provides access to a page where users can manage and configure various features specific to dashboards. This likely includes enabling or disabling certain functionalities.

adv-functions.against-field_description: Field label in the Advanced Functions section of a Transformer configuration: Prompts the user to input the name of a field used as a reference or comparison for an advanced data transformation.
adv-functions.alias_description: Label in the Advanced Functions section of BMC Helix Dashboards Transformers: This label prompts users to enter an alias. The alias provides a more descriptive or user-friendly name for a transformed data series or field.
adv-functions.field-name_description: Configuration option label in the advanced functions section of BMC Helix Dashboards transformers: Specifies the name of a data field that an advanced function will process or apply to.
adv-functions.function-name_description: Field Label in the Advanced Functions section of the Transformers feature: Indicates where the user can input or view the name of an advanced function.
adv-functions.percentage_description: Advanced function in the Advanced Functions section of the Transformers in BMC Helix Dashboards: This function allows users to apply percentage-based calculations or transformations to their data. It enables displaying values as a percentage of a total or another specified value.
adv-functions.percentile-placeholder_description: Placeholder text in the Advanced Functions within the Transformers feature: It guides users to enter a specific percentile value for data transformation.
adv-functions.percentile-value_description: Input field in Advanced Functions within Data Transformers: Used to specify the numerical percentile for data transformation or calculation.
adv-functions.previous-row_description: **Function** in **Advanced Functions within Data Transformations**: This function allows users to refer to data from the preceding row. It is typically used for sequential calculations or comparisons within a dataset.
adv-functions.previous-row-placeholder_description: Reference token in the Advanced Functions section of data transformers: Represents a variable or data point corresponding to the row immediately preceding the current one. It enables defining calculations that compare or aggregate values across rows.
adv-functions.rank-placeholder_description: Option name in Advanced Functions (Transformers): This setting or function allows users to apply a ranking operation to their data.
adv-functions.rank-value_description: Advanced function in Data Transformers: This function allows users to assign ranks to values within their data. It is part of the advanced data manipulation capabilities available during data transformation.

dynamic-fields.add-aria_description: Button in the Dynamic Fields configuration section within BMC Helix Dashboards Transformers: Allows users to add a new field to a list of fields that require sanitization. This is typically used in data transformation workflows.
dynamic-fields.add-button_description: Button in the Dynamic Fields section of the Transformers module: Initiates the process of adding a new dynamic field for data transformation.
dynamic-fields.field-label_description: Label in BMC Helix Dashboards' dynamic field configuration: Prompts the user to specify or identify a data field. This is typically used when configuring data transformers to create or modify data fields.
dynamic-fields.format-as_description: Label in the Dynamic Fields section of a Transformer configuration: Prompts the user to define how a dynamic field's value should be displayed or interpreted. This typically involves selecting a data type or presentation format.
dynamic-fields.remove-aria: Remove dynamic fields formatter field type transformer
dynamic-fields.remove-aria_description: **Button or action** in **Dynamic Fields transformer configuration**: **Allows users to remove a specific dynamic fields formatter field type transformer from the current setup.**

sanitize.add-aria_description: Button text in the Sanitize transformer configuration: Guides the user to select and add a data field that will undergo a sanitization process. This action is used when configuring data transformations to clean or obscure specific data points.
sanitize.add-button_description: Button in the Sanitize transformer configuration: Used to add a new field entry or rule for data sanitization.
sanitize.field-label_description: Text label in the Sanitize data transformer configuration: This label identifies the specific data field or column to which sanitization rules will be applied.
sanitize.remove-aria_description: Option in the Sanitize section of the Transformers configuration: Allows users to remove a configured transformer that processes data sanitization for a field type.

optimize.deselect-all_description: Button in the variable optimization settings: Clears all currently selected optimization options or variables.
