geomap.description-mouse-wheel-zoom_description: Setting in Geomap panel configuration: Controls whether users can zoom the geomap visualization using their mouse wheel.
geomap.description-no-repeat: Prevent the map from repeating horizontally
geomap.description-no-repeat_description: Description for a setting in the Geomap panel options: This text explains the purpose of a setting that prevents the geographical map from repeating horizontally across the display.
geomap.description-share-view: Use the same view across multiple panels.  Note: this may require a dashboard reload.
geomap.description-show-attribution: Show the map source attribution info in the lower right
geomap.description-show-attribution_description: Label for a checkbox in the Geomap configuration panel: This controls the visibility of the map's data source and copyright attribution. When enabled, the attribution information is displayed in the lower-right corner of the map.
geomap.description-show-debug_description: Button in the GeoMap panel: When clicked, it displays technical or debug information about the geo map. This feature is typically used for troubleshooting or advanced diagnostics.
geomap.description-show-measure: Show tools for making measurements on the map
geomap.description-show-measure_description: Description text in the GeoMap component: Explains the function of a control (e.g., button or checkbox) that, when activated, displays tools for making various measurements on the map.
geomap.description-show-scale_description: Text label in Geomap panel configuration: Describes an option that, when enabled, displays the map scale directly on the Geomap visualization.
geomap.description-show-zoom: Show zoom control buttons in the upper left corner
geomap.description-show-zoom_description: Checkbox label in geomap display settings: Controls the visibility of the zoom control buttons on the geomap. When enabled, these buttons are shown in the upper left corner of the geomap.

all-layers-editor-fragment.label-layer_description: Label in the "All Layers Editor" fragment within the GeoMap view editor: It identifies a distinct layer of information on the map, allowing users to manage or configure its properties.

fit-map-view-editor.label-data_description: Label in the Geomap's 'Fit Map View Editor': Identifies the input or selection area for configuring the data that defines the automatic adjustment of the map view.

last-only-editor-fragment.label-padding_description: Setting in the Fit Map View editor for geomaps, specifically within the 'Last Only' configuration fragment: Allows users to define the internal spacing around labels displayed on the map.
last-only-editor-fragment.tooltip-padding-relative-percent-beyond-: Sets padding in relative percent beyond data extent

**A setting for tooltip padding** in the **GeoMap's Fit Map View Editor**: This option allows users to define the amount of extra space, expressed as a relative percentage, that is added around the geographical data's extent. This padding ensures tooltips are not clipped and are fully visible when the map automatically adjusts its view to fit the data.

frame-multi-selection-editor.placeholder-change-filter_description: Placeholder text in the multi-selection editor of a geomap frame: It prompts the user to change or modify the currently applied filter. This text guides users on how to adjust the data displayed.

frame-selection-editor.placeholder-change-filter_description: Button in the GeoMap Frame Selection Editor: Allows the user to modify or select a different data filter that is applied to the geomap frame.

geomap-panel.aria-label-map_description: ARIA label in the GeoMap panel: Describes the interactive map component. This label is used by screen readers to inform users that the map supports navigation (e.g., zooming, panning).

geomap-style-rules-editor.aria-label-add-geomap-style-rule_descrip: Button in the Geomap Style Rules Editor: Allows the user to add a new rule to define how data is styled or presented on the geomap.

layer-editor.category-base-layer_description: Category heading in the geomap layer editor: Groups options for configuring the foundational background map layer. This layer serves as the base for all other data overlays.
layer-editor.description-display-tooltip_description: Label for a checkbox or toggle switch in the GeoMap layer editor: This controls whether the tooltip for the active layer is displayed on the map when hovering over it.
layer-editor.name-data_description: Section header in the geomap layer editor: This element introduces the configuration options for defining the data source and associated properties for the selected layer.
layer-editor.name-display-tooltip_description: Checkbox or toggle switch in the GeoMap Layer Editor: This control determines whether tooltips are displayed for elements or features within the configured map layer.
layer-editor.name-layer-type_description: Label in the GeoMap layer editor: This identifies the specific type of data visualization or source configured for a map layer. It typically accompanies a dropdown or input field where the user selects the layer's functional type (e.g., markers, heatmaps).
layer-editor.name-opacity_description: Property Label in the geomap layer editor: It identifies the setting for adjusting the transparency of a map layer.

layers-editor.label-add-layer_description: Button in the GeoMap layers editor: Allows users to add a new layer to the GeoMap visualization.
layers-editor.no-layers_description: Message in the GeoMap Layers Editor: Informs the user when no layers are currently configured or displayed, likely prompting them to add new layers.

map-view-editor.label-max-zoom_description: Label in Geomap view editor: Denotes the setting for the maximum zoom level permitted on a geomap. This controls how closely users can zoom into the map.
map-view-editor.label-view_description: Label in the geomap view editor: This text identifies a section or setting that configures how the map is displayed or rendered.
map-view-editor.label-zoom_description: Label in the map view editor within the Geomap feature: Refers to the control or setting used to adjust the magnification level of the map.
map-view-editor.use-current-map-settings_description: Button in the Geomap View Editor: This option allows users to apply or adopt the map settings currently displayed or configured within the editor.

markers-layer.description-show-legend_description: UI control label in the configuration settings for the geomap's markers layer: Controls the visibility of the map legend.
markers-layer.name-show-legend_description: Toggle switch in the settings for the markers layer on a Geomap: Controls the visibility of the legend that explains the meaning of the markers on the map.
markers-layer.name-styles_description: Label in the markers layer configuration for a geomap: This identifies the section where users can define the visual styles (e.g., color, size, shape) of the markers.

markers-legend.title-symbol_description: Title in the markers legend in a geomap: Identifies the column or section displaying the visual icon or shape used for markers on the map.

measure-overlay.aria-label-close_description: Button in the measure tools overlay on a geomap: This button allows users to close or dismiss the measurement tools. It serves as an accessibility label for the close action.
measure-overlay.tooltip-show-measure-tools_description: Button on the measure overlay of a geomap: This button allows the user to display available measurement tools. The key path suggests this control may be part of a tooltip or a contextual menu within the overlay.

geomap.name-initial-view_description: A setting in GeoMap configuration: This defines the default zoom level, center point, and visible area of a GeoMap when it is initially loaded.
geomap.name-mouse-wheel-zoom_description: Label for a setting in GeoMap configuration: This string indicates the option that enables or disables the ability to zoom in and out on the geomap using the mouse wheel.
geomap.name-no-repeat_description: Option in Geomap configuration settings: Specifies that the geographic map visualization will not repeat horizontally. This prevents multiple map instances from displaying side-by-side.
geomap.name-share-view_description: Button in a Geomap panel: Allows users to share the current display or configuration of the geomap.
geomap.name-show-attribution_description: Checkbox in Geomap settings: Controls the visibility of the map's data attribution, such as copyright or source information, on the geomap.
geomap.name-show-debug_description: Toggle switch in the GeoMap component settings: Controls the visibility of debugging information or tools, intended for troubleshooting purposes.
geomap.name-show-measure_description: Option within the geomap interface: Toggles the display of measurement tools. These tools enable users to calculate distances or areas directly on the map.
geomap.name-show-scale_description: Checkbox in geomap configuration settings: Controls whether the map scale is displayed on the geomap.
geomap.name-show-zoom_description: Checkbox option in Geomap settings: Determines whether the interactive zoom controls (e.g., zoom in/out buttons) are displayed on the geomap visualization.
geomap.name-tooltip_description: Label in Geomap settings: Refers to the option or toggle for configuring the tooltip display on a geomap.

photos-layer.noFieldsMessage-no-string-fields_descrip: Status message in the Geomap Photos layer configuration: Informs the user that no string fields were found in the data source, which are often required for specific photo layer settings like image URLs or identifiers.

plugin.basemap-layer-configured-server-admin: The basemap layer is configured by the server admin.
plugin.basemap-layer-configured-server-admin_de: Informational message in the GeoMap panel's basemap configuration settings: It indicates that the basemap layer is configured at a server level. This explains why the basemap settings might not be editable by the current user.

horizontal-align-options.label-center_description: Option in GeoMap Style Editor > Horizontal Align Options: Allows users to horizontally align labels or text to the center.
horizontal-align-options.label-left_description: Option label in the Horizontal Align Options section of the GeoMap Style Editor: Designates the 'Left' choice for horizontal alignment of elements within the geomap.
horizontal-align-options.label-right_description: Option label in the geomap style editor, within the horizontal alignment options: Represents the choice to align an element (such as a label or text) to the right on the geomap.

style-editor.label-align_description: Control in the Geomap style editor: Used to adjust the horizontal or vertical alignment of labels displayed on the geomap.
style-editor.label-baseline_description: Label in the Geomap style editor: This label identifies a setting used to define a baseline or reference point for visual styling, such as color scales or thresholds.
style-editor.label-color_description: Label for a color selection control in the GeoMap Style Editor: This string indicates where users can choose the color for a specific style property, such as text labels displayed on the map.
style-editor.label-fill-opacity_description: Label in Style Editor for Geomaps: This controls the transparency of the fill color for elements displayed on the geomap.
style-editor.label-font-size_description: Setting in the Geomap Style Editor: Controls the font size for labels displayed on the geomap.
style-editor.label-opacity_description: Setting in the GeoMap Style Editor: Controls the transparency level of labels displayed on a geomap.
style-editor.label-rotation-angle_description: Setting label in the GeoMap style editor: This label identifies a control (e.g., input field, slider) for adjusting the rotation angle of text labels displayed on the geomap.
style-editor.label-size_description: An input field or slider in the GeoMap Style Editor: Used to adjust the font size of labels displayed on the geomap.
style-editor.label-symbol_description: Label in the Geomap Style Editor: This label identifies the option to configure the visual symbol used for data points or layers on the geomap.
style-editor.label-symbol-horizontal-align_descriptio: Label in Style editor for GeoMap visualizations: This label identifies a control used to adjust the horizontal positioning of symbols (e.g., markers or icons) displayed on the map.
style-editor.label-symbol-vertical-align_description: This label in the GeoMap Style Editor refers to a control for setting the vertical alignment of a symbol. This impacts how symbols are positioned vertically relative to other elements on the map.
style-editor.label-text-label_description: Label for an input field in the Geomap Style Editor: This field is used to define the text content that will be displayed as a label on the geomap.
style-editor.label-x-offset_description: Input field label in the GeoMap Style Editor: Controls the horizontal (X-axis) offset for positioning labels on the geomap.
style-editor.label-y-offset_description: Setting label in the Geomap Style Editor: Specifies the vertical adjustment (Y-axis offset) for labels displayed on the geomap.
style-editor.placeholderText-select-symbol_descriptio: Placeholder text in the Geomap Style Editor: Guides the user to select a symbol for styling data points on the geomap.
style-editor.placeholderText-select-symbol-or-add-tex: Select a symbol or add a text label
Placeholder text in the Geomap style editor: This prompt guides the user to either select an existing symbol or enter custom text to create a label for map elements.

vertical-align-options.label-bottom_description: Option in the Geomap style editor's vertical alignment settings: Selects the bottom position for vertical alignment of an element, such as a label or data point.
vertical-align-options.label-center_description: Selection option in the GeoMap style editor's vertical alignment options: Allows users to set the vertical alignment of a text label to the center position.
vertical-align-options.label-top_description: Option in the geomap style editor's vertical alignment options for labels: Specifies top alignment for the label.

style-rule-editor.aria-label-comparison-operator_descripti: Accessibility label in the Style rule editor for Geomap: It identifies the field where users select or input the comparison operator (e.g., 'greater than', 'equals') to define a styling rule.
style-rule-editor.aria-label-comparison-value_description: Input field label in the Geomap Style Rule Editor: This label identifies the field where users enter a specific value to be used as a threshold for comparison in defining styling rules. This value determines when a particular style is applied to data points on the map.
style-rule-editor.aria-label-delete-style-rule_description: Button in the Geomap Style Rule Editor: Allows the user to remove a previously defined style rule from the geomap configuration.
style-rule-editor.aria-label-feature-property_description: Label for an input field or selection in the Geomap Style Rule Editor: This allows users to specify a characteristic property of a geographic feature. This property is then used to define conditional styling rules for the map.
style-rule-editor.label-rule_description: Label in the GeoMap style rule editor: This label identifies a specific rule that is being configured or displayed. It likely serves as a title or identifier for a section dedicated to one rule's settings.
style-rule-editor.placeholder-feature-property_description: Placeholder text in the GeoMap style rule editor: Prompts the user to specify a property of a geographical feature (e.g., population, status) that will be used to define a styling rule.
style-rule-editor.placeholder-numeric-value_description: Placeholder text in an input field in the geomap style rule editor: It prompts the user to enter a numeric value when defining a style rule.
style-rule-editor.placeholder-value_description: Placeholder text in the GeoMap Style Rule Editor: This indicates where to enter the specific value that a styling rule will be based upon.

tooltip-options.description-details_description: Option in the GeoMap panel's Tooltip options: Enables or disables the display of a popup window with additional details when a user hovers over elements on the geomap.
tooltip-options.description-none: Show contents on click, not hover
tooltip-options.description-none_description: **UI Option** in **the tooltip options of a geomap panel**: This option configures the display trigger for geomap tooltips. It specifies that tooltip content will be shown only when a user clicks on an element, rather than upon hovering.
tooltip-options.label-details_description: Label in Geomap tooltip options: This label or heading introduces settings for displaying detailed information within the geomap's tooltip.
tooltip-options.label-none_description: Option label in Geomap tooltip configuration: Allows users to select 'None' for a specific setting, typically to disable a display element or choose no specific value to be shown in the tooltip.

utils.get-next-layer-name_description: Layer name template in GeoMap layer configuration: Provides a default naming convention for newly created layers. The `{{name}}` placeholder is dynamically replaced with a unique layer identifier.

get-enterprise.requires-license_description: Message in a feature-gated section or a 'Get Enterprise' dialog: It informs the user that a Grafana Enterprise license is required to use the associated functionality or feature.
get-enterprise.title: Enterprise
get-enterprise.title_description: Title on an Enterprise management page: Labels the view that displays or allows configuration of enterprise-level data and settings.

docs-card.complete_description: Status indicator in a 'Getting Started' documentation card: Displays that a specific task or step within the card has been successfully finished.
docs-card.learn-how_description: Link text in a documentation card on the getting started page: Guides users to external documentation for learning how to use the product or a specific feature.

getting-started.aria-label-to-advanced-tutorials_descrip: Link in the Getting Started section: An ARIA label for a link that directs users to a page or section containing more advanced tutorials.
getting-started.aria-label-to-basic-tutorials_descriptio: ARIA label for a link or button in the Getting Started section: Navigates users to basic product tutorials. This label provides accessibility context for the interactive element.
getting-started.checking-completed-setup-steps_descripti: Status message in the Getting Started section: It informs the user that the system is currently verifying which initial setup steps have been successfully completed.
getting-started.remove-this-panel_description: Menu item in a 'Getting Started' panel's options menu: Allows the user to remove or hide that specific panel. This panel likely provides introductory content or guidance.

tutorial-card.complete_description: Status label on a tutorial card within the Getting Started section: Indicates that the associated tutorial has been successfully finished or marked as complete. The English string "complete" functions as a shorthand for "completed" in this context.

configure-irm.configure_description: Button in the 'Configure IRM' section: Allows users to access and modify the settings or parameters for the IRM module.
configure-irm.irm-apps_description: Section title in the 'Configure IRM' settings: Designates the area where users can manage or view applications related to the IRM system.

essentials.title-essentials_description: Section title in the 'gops' area: Labels a key section that provides access to fundamental features, important configurations, or core information within BMC Helix Dashboards.

progress-bar.steps-status_description: Progress Status Text in a Progress Bar: Displays the current completion status, showing how many steps have been completed out of the total number of steps. The `<0>` tag is used for styling the `stepsDone` count, likely for emphasis.

progress-status.your-progress_description: Label in the Progress Status section: Indicates the user's personal advancement or current status within a workflow, task, or activity.

title.connect-data-source_description: Title in the data source connection configuration UI: It identifies the action or area for connecting or configuring a data source.

title.essentials_description: Section title or tab label within a UI configuration screen in BMC Helix Dashboards: This title designates a section that groups the most essential or core settings and information.

description.configure-grafana-alerting_description: Action link in the Essentials configuration section: Allows users to configure Grafana's alerting capabilities. This is a core option for setting up essential monitoring features.
description.create-integration-alerting-contact-poin: Create an IRM integration for an alerting contact point.
Description text in the Essentials configuration content area: This text explains the process of creating an Incident Response Management (IRM) integration to be used with an alerting contact point.
description.initialize-incident-plugin-declare-manag: Initialize the Incident plugin to declare and manage incidents.
Description text in the Essentials Configuration setup: Explains that initializing the Incident plugin is required to declare and manage incidents.
description.practice-solving-an-incident_description: Description in the 'Essential Content' configuration section of the Guided Operations (gops) feature in BMC Helix Dashboards: This text describes a guided practice activity focused on learning how to resolve incidents.
description.receive-alerts-oncall-notifications-with: Receive alerts and oncall notifications within your chat environment.
Feature description in the Essentials configuration: Describes the capability for users to receive alerts and on-call notifications directly within their integrated chat environment.
description.select-chat-ops-channels-to-route-notifi: Select ChatOps channels to route notifications
Instruction text or label in the Essentials Configuration section within the GoOps module: Prompts the user to select the specific ChatOps channels where system notifications will be routed.

label.connect_description: Label in the Essential Content configuration: Used to initiate a connection to a service or data source, likely as part of setting up essential features.
label.initialize_description: Button label in the Essentials Configuration or Essential Content section: This button allows users to initialize or reset the essential content or related configuration settings.
label.select-integration_description: Label in the Essential Content configuration section: Prompts the user to select an integration from a list of available options.
label.start-drill_description: Label in the essential content configuration for BMC Helix Dashboards: This string prompts the user to start a data drill-down or exploration. It allows users to view more detailed or related information within the dashboard.

title.add-slack-notifications-to-irm-integrati: Add Slack notifications to IRM integrations

Title in the BMC Helix Dashboards Essential Content configuration settings: This title labels a section or feature for adding Slack notifications to IT/Incident Response Management (IRM) integrations.
title.connect-alerting-to-irm_description: Title in Essential Configuration content section: This title introduces a feature or section where users can configure the integration of their alerting system with an Incident Resolution Management (IRM) system. It describes the action of establishing this connection.
title.connect-irm-to-your-slack-workspace: Connect IRM to your Slack workspace
title.connect-irm-to-your-slack-workspace_desc: Title in an Essential Configuration section: This title prompts the user to connect their IRM system with their Slack workspace. It serves as a heading for an integration task or a clickable link to initiate the connection process.
title.connect-your-messaging-workspace-to-inci: Connect your Messaging workspace to Incident
Title in the essential content configuration section of the gops module: It prompts the user to connect their messaging workspace with the Incident management system for integration purposes.
title.connect-your-messaging-workspace-to-on-c: Connect your Messaging workspace to OnCall

Title in an Essential Content section for configuration within BMC Helix Dashboards: This title prompts users to connect their messaging workspace with the OnCall system, indicating a crucial setup step for system integration.
title.create-incident-drill_description: Title in the Essential Content Configuration section for operations: This refers to the action of creating a new incident drill, which could be a detailed data exploration or a simulated exercise related to incidents.
title.detect_description: Title of an action or functionality in the 'Essential Content' configuration section: Initiates a process to detect or identify relevant items or configurations.
title.initialize-incident-plugin_description: Title in the essential content configuration section of the BMC Helix Dashboards `gops` module: This title guides the user to initialize or enable the Incident plugin. It represents a step in setting up this specific modular component within the dashboard.
title.messaging-workspace-channel-on-call-inte: Add Messaging workspace channel to OnCall Integration
Section Title in the OnCall Integration settings within the Essentials Configuration: It allows users to add a messaging workspace channel for notification integration.
title.respond_description: Title in the 'Essential Content' section: Prompts the user to take action or provide a response related to essential configurations.
title.test-your-configuration_description: Action button label in the Essential Content configuration section: It prompts the user to initiate a test or validation process for their essential content settings.

description.create-alert-monitor-system: Create an alert rule to monitor your system.
description.create-alert-monitor-system_description: Description in the Grafana alerting configuration steps: Guides the user to create an alert rule for system monitoring. This text is likely displayed as an instructional step in a setup wizard.
description.create-on-call-integration-alerting-cont: Create an OnCall integration for an alerting contact point.

Instructional text in the Grafana Alerting Configuration steps for BMC Helix Dashboards: Guides the user on creating an OnCall integration for an alerting contact point. This is a crucial step in setting up essential alerting functionalities.
description.create-slos-to-monitor-your-service: Create SLOs to monitor your service.
description.create-slos-to-monitor-your-service_desc: Instructional text in the Grafana alerting configuration steps: This text provides a recommendation or a step for users to create Service Level Objectives (SLOs) to effectively monitor their services. It appears as part of a configuration process or a best practice guide for setting up Grafana alerting.

label.connect_description: Button in Grafana alerting configuration steps: Initiates the connection process to Grafana or an alerting service.
label.enable_description: Label in the Grafana Alerting configuration steps: Indicates the action or option to activate Grafana alerting.

title.update-default-contact-point_description: Step title in the Grafana alerting configuration workflow: It indicates the current step involves updating the system's default contact point for alerts. This contact point specifies where alerts are sent if no specific routing is configured.

title.connect-alerting-to-on-call_description: Title in the Grafana alerting configuration steps: This title indicates a step for connecting the alerting system (likely Grafana's) to an OnCall management service. It is part of the essential configuration flow.
title.create-alert-rule_description: Title in the Grafana alerting configuration steps: Identifies a step or section for defining and creating a new alert rule. This title guides the user through the process of setting up new alerting conditions.
title.create-slo_description: Title in the Grafana alerting configuration steps within the Essentials Configuration section: Indicates the purpose of the current page or dialog is to create a new Service Level Objective (SLO).
title.enable-slo-alerting_description: Title in the Grafana Alerting configuration steps (likely within an Essentials Configuration wizard): This title prompts the user to enable Service Level Objective (SLO) alerting.

edit-pane.go-back_description: Button in the dashboard edit pane: Allows the user to exit the editing interface and return to the dashboard's view mode, potentially discarding unsaved changes.

grafana.select-group_description: Label or placeholder text for a selection control in the Grafana UI: Prompts the user to choose a specific group from a list of available options.

getBaseRangeOptions.dayBeforeYesterday_description: Time range option in a time range selector: Enables users to quickly select 'the day before yesterday' as a predefined date range.
getBaseRangeOptions.previousFiscalQuarter_description: Predefined time range option in a time range selection interface: Allows users to quickly select the fiscal quarter immediately preceding the current one for data analysis. This option considers an organization's specific financial calendar, which may differ from a standard calendar quarter.
getBaseRangeOptions.previousFiscalYear_description: Time range option in a Date/Time Range Selector: Represents a predefined selection for the previous fiscal year. Users can quickly apply this filter to view data from that specific period.
getBaseRangeOptions.previousMonth_description: A time range option in a date/time range selector: This option allows users to quickly select the previous calendar month as the desired time range for data display.
getBaseRangeOptions.previousWeek_description: Option in a time range selection dropdown: Allows users to quickly set the dashboard's data display period to the previous full week.
getBaseRangeOptions.previousYear_description: Time range option in a date/time range selection menu: Allows users to quickly set the data display period to the entire previous calendar year. It is one of the predefined base time range options.
getBaseRangeOptions.thisDayLastWeek_description: Time range option in the Time Range Picker: Allows users to quickly select the same day of the week from the previous week. This is a common predefined relative time range.
getBaseRangeOptions.thisFiscalQuarter_description: Option label in date/time range selector: Represents a predefined time range option for selecting the current fiscal quarter. This option allows users to quickly filter data to the current fiscal quarter.
getBaseRangeOptions.thisFiscalQuarterSoFar_description: Time range option in a time range selector: Allows users to select a predefined relative period covering the current fiscal quarter from its start to the present moment. This option is dynamic and adapts based on the current date and configured fiscal quarter settings.
getBaseRangeOptions.thisFiscalYear_description: Menu item in the date/time range selection menu: Allows users to set the data display period to the current fiscal year.
getBaseRangeOptions.thisFiscalYearSoFar_description: Time range option in a time range selection dropdown: This option allows users to select the data range from the beginning of the current fiscal year up to the current date and time. It provides a dynamic view for the ongoing fiscal period.
getBaseRangeOptions.thisMonth_description: Time range option in a date range selector: This option allows users to filter or display data for the current calendar month.
getBaseRangeOptions.thisMonthSoFar_description: Time range option in a date/time range selector: Provides a predefined relative time range covering the period from the beginning of the current calendar month until the present moment.
getBaseRangeOptions.thisWeek_description: Time range option in a time range selector or date picker: Allows users to set the data display period to the current calendar week. This is a standard, predefined time range option.
getBaseRangeOptions.thisWeekSoFar_description: Date Range Option in a Time Range Picker: Selects a relative time range from the start of the current week up to the present moment.
getBaseRangeOptions.thisYear_description: Option label within the base date range options utility for Grafana data: Allows users to quickly set the data display or filter period to the current calendar year.
getBaseRangeOptions.thisYearSoFar_description: Time range option in a date range selection dropdown or menu: This option allows users to quickly select the period from the beginning of the current calendar year up to the present moment.
getBaseRangeOptions.today_description: Option in a time range selection menu: This predefined option allows users to select the current day as the data display period.
getBaseRangeOptions.todaySoFar_description: Time range option in a time range selector menu: Allows users to quickly select a predefined time period for data display, covering the current day from its very beginning up to the current moment. This option is used for filtering data to show only what has occurred "today so far.
getBaseRangeOptions.yesterday_description: Time Range Option in the time range selection interface: Represents a predefined option to quickly set the data time range to the previous calendar day.

rangeutils.lastNDays_one_description: Label for a time range option in the date and time range selection interface: Used to display the singular form for a relative time range of one day. This string specifically handles the grammatical conjugation for "day" when the count is 1.
rangeutils.lastNDays_other_description: Time range option label in Date/time range selection: Specifies a dynamic relative time range for dashboard data, looking back a configurable number of days. `{{count}}` is a placeholder for the number of days.
rangeutils.lastNHours_one_description: Time Range Option Label in datetime range utilities: This label represents an option to select data from the last single hour. It is specifically used when the 'count' value is 1.
rangeutils.lastNHours_other_description: Time range option label in the Date/Time Range Selector: Allows users to select a relative time window spanning the last specified number of hours. This key typically represents the customizable 'other' option where the user inputs the exact hour count.
rangeutils.lastNMinutes_one_description: Time Range Option Label in the Time Range Selector: This label allows users to select a relative time window covering the past single minute. It is the singular form for when the count is '1'.
rangeutils.lastNMinutes_other_description: Time Range Option in the time range selection utilities: Allows users to specify a relative time window for data display, showing events from a variable number of minutes ago until now. The `{{count}}` placeholder represents the number of minutes.
rangeutils.lastNMonths_one_description: Time range option in a date/time range selection utility: Defines a relative time range for displaying data from the most recent single month. This specific string is the singular form used when `{{count}}` is 1.
rangeutils.lastNMonths_other_description: Time range option label in Date/time range selection utilities: Specifies a relative time range spanning a dynamic number of past months.
rangeutils.lastNYears_one_description: Time Range Label in Date/Time Range Utilities: This label represents a predefined time range option for selecting a singular 'Last N year' period, such as 'Last 1 year'. It is used within a pluralization system to display the correct grammatical form based on the `count` value.
rangeutils.lastNYears_other_description: Option label in date and time range selectors: Allows users to choose a dynamic relative time range representing the past N years. The `{{count}}` placeholder is replaced by a numerical value.
rangeutils.nextNDays_one_description: Date range option label in Date/Time range selection utilities: This string defines the label for a time range spanning the next single day. It is the singular form used in a pluralization set for "Next N Days" selections.
rangeutils.nextNDays_other_description: Time Range Option Label in Date/Time Range Selector: Specifies a dynamic future time range. This option allows users to define a period covering the next 'count' number of days.
rangeutils.nextNHours_one_description: Time Range Option Label in the Date/Time utility: This label defines an option for a relative time range, specifying the upcoming single hour from the current moment. It is used when the count is 1, as indicated by the `_one` suffix.
rangeutils.nextNHours_other_description: Time range selection option in time range selection menus: This allows users to dynamically define a data display window covering the upcoming specified number of hours. `{{count}}` acts as a placeholder for the numerical value.
rangeutils.nextNMinutes_one_description: Time Range Label in the Time Range Selection Interface: This label indicates a future relative time duration of one minute. It is the singular form used when the count is '1'.
rangeutils.nextNMinutes_other_description: Time Range Option in a Date/Time Range Selector: Allows users to specify a relative time range extending for a defined number of minutes into the future from the current time.
rangeutils.nextNMonths_one_description: Date range option in datetime range utilities: It enables users to select a relative future time period covering the next single month. This string represents the singular form for when the count of months is one.
rangeutils.nextNMonths_other_description: Time Range Option in Date/Time Range Selector: This label defines a dynamic relative time range, allowing users to select the next specified number of months. The `{{count}}` placeholder is dynamically replaced with a numerical value.
rangeutils.nextNYears_one_description: Time range option label in the datetime range utilities: It defines a relative future time range of "Next 1 year" from the current moment. This specific string is used when the count variable is '1'.
rangeutils.nextNYears_other_description: Time Range Option in the Time Range Selection interface within BMC Helix Dashboards: This option allows users to define a dynamic time range spanning a specified number of years into the future. It represents the plural form for selecting 'Next X years'.

formats.name-feet-sec_description: Unit display string in the acceleration category of value format options: Defines the measurement unit "Feet/sec²" for acceleration values shown in dashboards.
formats.name-g-unit_description: Unit format name in the 'Acceleration' category of value formats: Represents the option to display acceleration values using the 'G unit' (g-force).
formats.name-meters-sec_description: Display unit string in the acceleration category of Grafana data value formats: Represents the unit "Meters/sec²" for displaying acceleration values.

acceleration.name: Acceleration
acceleration.name_description: Category name in the data value formats settings: Identifies a grouping of units and display options specifically for acceleration measurements.

formats.name-arc-minutes_description: Value format option in the angle category within value formatting settings: This option allows users to select 'Arc Minutes' as the unit for displaying angular values in dashboards.
formats.name-arc-seconds_description: Unit Name in the angle value format category: This string represents the display name for the "arc seconds" unit, used when selecting how to format angular values within dashboards.
formats.name-degrees_description: Format option name in the angle value format category: It is the display name for the format option that shows angular values in degrees, complete with its standard symbol.
formats.name-gradian_description: Value format option in the angle value formatting settings: This option allows users to select 'Gradian' as the unit for displaying angle measurements in dashboards. Gradian, also known as gon or grade, is a unit of angle where a right angle is 100 gradians.
formats.name-radians_description: Label in angle value formatting options: Allows users to select "Radians" as the unit for displaying angle measurements.

angle.name: Angle
angle.name_description: Category name in value format settings within BMC Helix Dashboards: This label identifies a category for formatting values that represent angles.

formats.name-acres_description: Value format option in Grafana's area settings: Represents the display name for the 'acres' unit of area measurement. This allows users to format data values in acres.
formats.name-hectares_description: Value format option in the 'Area' category of data formatting settings: This text label represents the 'Hectares' unit (ha), which users can select to display numerical data values.
formats.name-square-feet_description: Value format name in the value format selection for area measurements: This string is the display name for the "Square Feet" unit. It is used when configuring how area-related data values are presented in dashboards.
formats.name-square-meters_description: UI string in the area value format settings: Defines the display name for the 'Square Meters' unit. This string is presented as an option for users to select how area values are formatted in dashboards.
formats.name-square-miles_description: Unit display name in the value format options for the 'Area' category in Grafana: This string provides the user-facing label for the 'Square Miles' unit (mi²) when configuring how area values are displayed in dashboards.

area.name: Area
area.name_description: Category label in Value Format settings: This option represents a category for formatting numerical values that correspond to physical or geometric areas. Users select this to apply specific display formats suitable for area units.

formats.name-on-off_description: A format option label in the boolean value formatting settings: This label represents an option to display true/false states as 'On / Off'.
formats.name-true-false_description: Option label in boolean value format settings: This is the name for a specific format choice that displays boolean data as 'True' or 'False'.
formats.name-yes-no_description: Format option name in the boolean value formatting settings within BMC Helix Dashboards: This label represents a display format that converts `true` to "Yes" and `false` to "No" for boolean values.

boolean.name: Boolean
boolean.name_description: Label in the value format category selection: Identifies the "Boolean" data type within the available value formatting categories. This allows users to apply specific display options for true/false values.

formats.name-eflops_description: Value Format Name in the computation category of Grafana data formatting: Specifies the display unit for extremely high computational performance as ExaFLOPS per second (EFLOP/s). This unit is used to quantify very large numbers of floating-point operations per second.
formats.name-flops_description: Value format name in Grafana data value formatting options for computation metrics: This string defines the display unit "FLOP/s" for metrics representing computational performance (Floating-point Operations Per Second).
formats.name-gflops_description: Unit Name in the Computation category within Value Formats settings: This string "GFLOP/s" defines the display name for a unit representing Giga Floating-point Operations per Second in dashboard visualizations. It is used when configuring how computational performance metrics are displayed.
formats.name-mflops_description: Value format option label in the 'computation' category of value formats within BMC Helix Dashboards: Represents the display unit "MFLOP/s" for Mega Floating-point Operations per Second, used for computational performance metrics.
formats.name-pflops_description: Unit Label within the 'Computation' category of value formats: It specifies the display name for PetaFLOPs per second (PFLOP/s), a unit used to measure computational power. This label is used when configuring how computational performance metrics are displayed in dashboards.
formats.name-tflops_description: Display unit in value format options for computation metrics within Grafana data: It represents the "Tera Floating Point Operations Per Second" unit used for displaying computational performance.
formats.name-yflops_description: Data format label in the computation category of value formats: Represents the unit for displaying computational performance as Yottaflops per second.
formats.name-zflops_description: Format name in the 'Computation' category of value formats: Represents the unit "Zetta Floating Point Operations Per Second" (ZFLOP/s). This unit is used for displaying extremely high computational performance metrics.

computation.name: Computation
computation.name_description: Category Name in Value Formats settings: It labels a category that groups various computation-related formatting options.

formats.name-g-m3_description: Display name for a unit format in the value format selection for concentration categories. This string represents 'gram per cubic meter (g/m³)' as an option for users to display concentration values in dashboards.
formats.name-g-nm3_description: Value format label in the Concentration category of value format settings: This label defines the 'gram per normal cubic meter (g/Nm³)' unit for displaying concentration measurements in dashboards.
formats.name-mg-dl_description: Unit display name in Grafana data value format settings for concentration: It represents the user-facing label for the 'milligrams per decilitre (mg/dL)' unit when configuring how data values are displayed.
formats.name-mg-m3_description: Unit format name in the Value Formats section, under the 'Concentration' category: This string displays the 'milligram per cubic meter (mg/m³)' unit, used for formatting concentration values in dashboards.
formats.name-mg-nm3_description: Unit of Measure Name in Value Format Settings for Concentration Categories: Specifies a display unit for concentration data in dashboards. This entry defines 'milligram per normal cubic meter' (mg/Nm³).
formats.name-mmol-l_description: Unit format label in the value format options for concentration in BMC Helix Dashboards: It represents the display name for the 'millimoles per litre' concentration unit.
formats.name-ng-m3_description: Unit label in the value format settings for concentration categories: Specifies 'nanogram per cubic meter (ng/m³)' as a display unit for concentration values in dashboards and panels.
formats.name-ng-nm3_description: Unit name in value format options for concentration data in BMC Helix Dashboards: This string represents the display name for the 'nanogram per normal cubic meter' (ng/Nm³) unit. It is used to format and label concentration values, typically for substances in gases under standard conditions.
formats.name-ppb_description: Label in Grafana's value formatting options for concentration: This text identifies "parts-per-billion" as a selectable unit for displaying concentration data.
formats.name-ppm_description: Display name in the value format settings for concentration categories: Defines the 'parts-per-million (ppm)' unit for data display. This option allows users to select a unit for formatting concentration values.
formats.name-ug-m3_description: Format option name in the value formatting settings for concentration data: This string displays the human-readable name for the "microgram per cubic meter" unit (μg/m³).
formats.name-ug-nm3_description: Format option name in the concentration category of value formats: This is the display name for the 'microgram per normal cubic meter' unit, which users can select to format concentration data.

concentration.name: Concentration
concentration.name_description: Category Name in Value Formats options: This label represents a specific category of value formatting that applies to data points measuring concentration.

formats.name-bgn_description: Currency option label in the BMC Helix Dashboards currency format selection list: Identifies "Bulgarian Lev (BGN)" as a selectable currency format for displaying monetary values.
formats.name-brl_description: Option label in currency value formatting settings within dashboards: Identifies the display name for the Brazilian Real (BRL) currency format option.
formats.name-btc_description: Currency format display name in Grafana's value formatting options: This string identifies "Bitcoin (฿)" as a selectable option for formatting numerical data as Bitcoin currency.
formats.name-chf_description: Option label in currency format selection: Identifies the Swiss franc (CHF) currency. This string is displayed to users as a choice when configuring value formats for currency in dashboards.
formats.name-czk_description: Label in the Currency category of Value Formats settings: This string identifies the Czech Koruna (CZK) as a selectable currency option for formatting data values in dashboards.
formats.name-dkk_description: This is the display name for a currency format option. It appears in the currency selection menu, allowing users to format numerical values as Danish Krone (kr) in dashboards.
formats.name-eur_description: Label in currency value format settings: This display name identifies the Euro (€) currency format for selection and display in dashboard visualizations.
formats.name-gbp_description: Label in the currency value format options: Identifies the Great British Pound (GBP) for selection in dashboards. This string includes both the currency name and its symbol.
formats.name-idr_description: Display name in currency format settings: This string identifies the Indonesian Rupiah currency option. It is used when selecting how currency values are displayed in dashboards.
formats.name-ils_description: Currency format name in data value formatting settings: Identifies the Israeli New Shekel (₪) currency option for users to select. This is used for displaying numerical data as monetary values.
formats.name-inr_description: Label in currency value format settings: This identifies the Indian Rupee as a selectable option for formatting monetary values. It provides the full name and symbol for user clarity.
formats.name-isk_description: Display name in currency formatting options: Identifies the Icelandic Króna (ISK) currency unit. This string is presented to users when selecting a currency format for data display.
formats.name-jpy_description: Currency format name in currency format options within data value settings: Identifies 'Yen (¥)' as a selectable display format for currency values. This string represents the Japanese Yen.
formats.name-krw_description: Label in currency format selection within BMC Helix Dashboards: This string is the display name for the South Korean Won (KRW) currency format, which users can apply to display numerical data. It includes the currency symbol for easy identification.
formats.name-mbtc_description: Display name in Currency format options: This label identifies the Milli Bitcoin (m฿) currency unit, allowing users to select it as a display format for data values in dashboards.
formats.name-myr_description: Currency display name in currency format options: Identifies the Malaysian Ringgit (RM) as a selectable currency format for data display.
formats.name-nok_description: Currency format name in the currency category of value format settings within Grafana: This label represents the Norwegian Krone option for users to select as a display format for numerical data.
formats.name-php_description: Currency format option in the value formatting settings: This option represents the Philippine Peso currency. Users can select it to format dashboard data values as Philippine Pesos.
formats.name-pln_description: Currency name in the currency format selection menu: This value represents the display name for the Polish Złoty (PLN) when users choose a currency format for data visualization.
formats.name-pyg_description: Currency name in currency format settings: Identifies the Guaraní currency for display or selection in dashboards. The value includes its symbol (₲).
formats.name-rub_description: Label for a currency format option in data display settings: Identifies the Russian Ruble (₽) as a selectable currency for data visualization.
formats.name-sek_description: A label in currency formatting options: Identifies "Swedish Krona (kr)" as a selectable currency format for displaying data in BMC Helix Dashboards.
formats.name-try_description: Option label in the currency format selection menu: This identifies "Turkish Lira" as a specific currency formatting option. Users can choose this to display numerical data with the Turkish Lira symbol (₺).
formats.name-uah_description: Currency format name in value formatting options for currency: Identifies the Ukrainian Hryvnia currency for display in dashboards. The `(₴)` symbol is included for immediate recognition.
formats.name-ubtc_description: Format option name in the currency value format settings: This string serves as the display name for the 'Micro Bitcoin' unit, allowing users to select it for formatting numerical data in dashboards. It includes the Bitcoin symbol (฿) as part of its representation.
formats.name-usd_description: Label in the currency format selection list: Identifies the U.S. Dollar (USD) currency format.
formats.name-uyu_description: Currency name in currency format selection lists: Identifies the Uruguay Peso (UYU) as a selectable currency format for displaying data values.
formats.name-vnd_description: Label in the currency format settings: Identifies the Vietnamese Dong currency (VND) for data display and selection.
formats.name-xpf_description: Currency name in the currency formatting options: Represents the display name for the CFP franc (XPF) currency. This option is available for users to select when configuring how numerical data should be formatted as currency.
formats.name-zar_description: Currency format name in the value formatting settings: This string identifies the South African Rand, including its symbol (R), as an available option for currency display.

currency.name: Currency
currency.name_description: Category name in Value format categories settings: Identifies the 'Currency' option within the available value format categories. This allows users to select currency formatting for displaying data.

formats.name-bits-iec_description: Value format option in the data value formatting settings: This option allows users to display data values in bits, adhering to the IEC (International Electrotechnical Commission) standard for binary prefixes.
formats.name-bits-si_description: A format option in data value format settings: This string labels the option to display numerical data in bits, specifically using SI (International System of Units) prefixes.
formats.name-bytes-iec_description: Value format option in the value format settings: This option allows users to display numeric data as bytes using the IEC standard (powers of 1024, e.g., KiB, MiB). It is commonly used for displaying memory or storage sizes.
formats.name-bytes-si_description: Value format option name in the data unit selection menu: This option allows users to display data quantities in bytes, automatically scaled using standard international (SI) prefixes (e.g., kB, MB, GB). It is presented as a choice for formatting numerical data in dashboards.
formats.name-gibibytes_description: Data unit label in value format categories for data sizes within Grafana settings: This option identifies the "gibibytes" unit for displaying data storage values.
formats.name-gigabytes_description: Unit name in data value formatting options: This string labels the 'gigabytes' unit, allowing users to format and display numerical data values as gigabytes in dashboard visualizations.
formats.name-kibibytes_description: Data unit name in data format category settings: This string identifies 'kibibytes' as a selectable option for formatting and displaying data storage sizes. It is presented in a list of available data units.
formats.name-kilobytes_description: Option label in data value formatting settings: This string identifies 'kilobytes' as a selectable unit for displaying data values.
formats.name-mebibytes_description: Unit name in data value formatting options: Specifies the 'mebibytes' unit for displaying data size within panels or visualizations. This allows users to select mebibytes as a data unit for numerical values.
formats.name-megabytes_description: Data unit label in the value formatting options: Specifies "megabytes" as a unit for displaying data size in dashboards.
formats.name-pebibytes_description: Unit name in the 'Data' category of value format options: This string identifies 'pebibytes' as a selectable unit for displaying data size values in BMC Helix Dashboards. It represents the base name for this specific data format option.
formats.name-petabytes_description: Unit label in data formatting options: Identifies the 'petabytes' unit when formatting large data storage or transfer values for display in dashboard visualizations. This string appears in unit selection menus.
formats.name-tebibytes_description: Label in Grafana's data value formatting options: This string provides the display name for the 'tebibytes' unit, which users can select to format numerical data within dashboards. It's a standard unit of digital information.
formats.name-terabytes_description: Unit label in Grafana data formatting options: Represents "terabytes" as a selectable unit for displaying data size.

data.name: Data
data.name_description: Label in value format categories: Names the default or general category used for numerical or informational data types when configuring how values are displayed.

formats.name-bits-sec-iec_description: Value format option in the data rate value format category: Defines a display unit for data transfer rates in bits per second, utilizing IEC standard prefixes for scaling.
formats.name-bits-sec-si_description: Display name in the value formatting options for data rates: This label represents the "bits per second" unit using SI prefixes for displaying data transfer rates in dashboards.
formats.name-bytes-sec-iec_description: Display Name in Data Rate value format options: This label represents a unit for displaying data transfer rates as bytes per second. It uses the IEC standard for binary prefixes (e.g., KiB/s).
formats.name-bytes-sec-si_description: Value format name in Grafana data rate value format settings: This is the display name for a data rate unit representing 'bytes per second'. It specifies the use of SI (International System of Units) prefixes for measurement.
formats.name-gibibits-sec_description: Display name for a unit in the value formatting options for data rates: Represents "gibibits per second" as a selectable unit for visualizing data transfer speeds.
formats.name-gibibytes-sec_description: Format name within the data rate value format options: It specifies the 'gibibytes per second' unit for displaying data rate values.
formats.name-gigabits-sec_description: Format name in data rate value formatting options: This option allows users to display data transfer rates in gigabits per second within BMC Helix Dashboards.
formats.name-gigabytes-sec_description: Unit format name in data rate value format settings: Defines the label for displaying data transfer rates in gigabytes per second. This option is presented to users when configuring how data rate values should be formatted.
formats.name-kibibits-sec_description: Unit label in data rate value formats: Defines the display string for the "kibibits/sec" unit when presenting data transfer rates.
formats.name-kibibytes-sec_description: Format option name in the data rate formatting options for dashboards or panels: This label represents the "kibibytes per second" unit that users can select to display data transfer speeds.
formats.name-kilobits-sec_description: Display name in data rate unit selection: Represents the 'kilobits per second' unit used for formatting and displaying data transfer rates within a dashboard or panel.
formats.name-kilobytes-sec_description: Unit label in data rate formatting options: This unit specifies data transfer rates in kilobytes per second. It is used to format how data rate metrics are displayed in dashboards.
formats.name-mebibits-sec_description: Unit string in the data rate value formatting category: Represents the 'mebibits per second' unit. This string is displayed as an option for users to select how data rate values are formatted.
formats.name-mebibytes-sec_description: Display format name in data rate formatting options: This is the label for the 'mebibytes per second' unit, used to display data transfer rates.
formats.name-megabits-sec_description: Unit label in data rate formatting options: Specifies the display name for "megabits per second" as a unit of data transfer speed.
formats.name-megabytes-sec_description: A unit display name in the Data Rate category for value formats: This is presented as an option for users to select when specifying how data transfer rates should be displayed in dashboards.
formats.name-packets-sec_description: Value format option in Grafana Dashboards' data rate category: This string defines a unit for displaying network or data throughput measurements as 'packets per second'.
formats.name-pebibits-sec_description: Unit string in the value format options for data rate in BMC Helix Dashboards: Specifies the unit "pebibits per second" for displaying data transfer rates in dashboards.
formats.name-pebibytes-sec_description: Display name for a unit in the 'Data Rate' category of value formatting options: It represents the 'pebibytes per second' unit for displaying data transfer rates.
formats.name-petabits-sec_description: Display unit name in the data rate formatting options: This string represents the 'petabits/sec' unit, used for displaying or selecting data transfer rates within the dashboard.
formats.name-petabytes-sec_description: Unit display name in the data rate value format settings: Represents the 'petabytes per second' unit for displaying data transfer rates.
formats.name-tebibits-sec_description: Unit display string in the data rate unit selection dropdown: Represents the 'tebibits per second' unit for measuring data transfer rates.
formats.name-tebibytes-sec_description: Display unit in the data rate unit selection list: This option allows users to format and display data transfer rates in tebibytes per second.
formats.name-terabits-sec_description: Unit string in Grafana data value formatting options under the 'Data Rate' category: Specifies the display unit for data transfer rates. This option represents 'terabits per second'.
formats.name-terabytes-sec_description: Unit label in data rate value formatting options: This is a selectable option to display data transfer speeds in terabytes per second.

data-rate.name: Data rate
data-rate.name_description: Category name in Value formatting categories: Labels a group of formatting options for displaying data transfer speeds, such as bits/second or bytes/second.

formats.name-datetime-default_description: Label in Date and time formatting options: This label identifies the default format for displaying date and time values in BMC Helix Dashboards.
formats.name-datetime-iso_description: A format option label in the date and time value format settings: This label identifies the ISO 8601 standard for displaying dates and times in dashboard visualizations.
formats.name-datetime-iso-no-date_description: This formatting option name in the date and time format selection for data visualizations defines a display style for date and time values. It presents them in an ISO 8601 format, omitting the date part if the timestamp falls on the current day.
formats.name-datetime-local_description: Label in Grafana's date and time formatting options: Identifies a format that displays date and time values according to the user's local timezone.
formats.name-datetime-local-no-date_description: Display Format Option Name in the Date/Time category of value formatting settings: This option defines a display format for timestamps. It shows the date and time in the local timezone, omitting the date if the timestamp is from the current day.
formats.name-datetime-us_description: Format option label in the date and time value format selection settings: Users select this option to apply a standard US date and time display format to data in panels and visualizations.
formats.name-datetime-us-no-date_description: Format option label in the date and time format selection: This option allows users to display date and time values in a US-centric format, omitting the date part if the timestamp is from the current day for conciseness.
formats.name-from-now_description: Label for a date/time formatting option in the Date/Time Value Formatting settings: This option displays time intervals relative to the current moment.

date-time.name: Date & time
date-time.name_description: Category name in Value Format Settings: This label identifies a category for options related to formatting date and time values.

formats.name-ampere_description: Unit label in the value format selection menu: Displays the name for the 'Ampere' unit (A) within the 'Energy' category of data formatting options. Users select this to format data values representing electric current.
formats.name-ampere-hour_description: Value format name in the energy category of value format settings: This string defines the display name for the 'Ampere-hour' unit of measurement. It is used to label or format data values related to energy.
formats.name-decibel-milliwatt_description: Format option label in a unit selection dropdown for value formatting within BMC Helix Dashboards, under the 'Energy' category: It displays the name of the 'Decibel-milliwatt (dBm)' unit. This unit is selected by users to represent power measurements, often in telecommunications or RF applications.
formats.name-electron-volt_description: Unit label in the energy category of value format options: This string represents the 'Electron volt (eV)' unit, allowing users to select it for formatting energy-related data in dashboards.
formats.name-farad_description: Display name in the value format options for the 'Energy' category: Identifies the "Farad (F)" unit of electrical capacitance for data visualization.
formats.name-femtofarad_description: Unit name in value formatting settings for the 'energy' category in BMC Helix Dashboards: This string represents the Femtofarad (fF) unit, used for formatting and displaying electrical capacitance values in dashboards.
formats.name-gigawatt_description: Display name for a unit of measurement in Grafana's data formatting settings for energy values: Provides the user-facing label for the "Gigawatt" unit when selecting display formats.
formats.name-henry_description: Measurement unit option in the value formatting settings for energy-related data: Represents the "Henry" unit of inductance (H) that users can select to display values.
formats.name-joule_description: Unit name in the energy value format options: This is the display name for the Joule unit, selectable for formatting energy values in dashboards.
formats.name-kiloampere_description: Unit name in the 'Energy' category of value format options: This string identifies the 'Kiloampere (kA)' unit, used for formatting and displaying electrical current measurements in dashboards.
formats.name-kiloampere-hour_description: Format name in the energy unit formatting options: Represents the display name for the Kiloampere-hour (kAh) unit. This unit is used for measuring electrical charge or energy storage capacity.
formats.name-kiloohm_description: Unit name in value formatting options within the 'Energy' category: Displays the name and symbol for the Kiloohm unit (kΩ) available for selection or display in dashboards.
formats.name-kilovolt_description: Unit label in Value format settings for the 'Energy' category: Represents the display name for the Kilovolt unit (kV). This text is used to identify and select this specific unit when formatting energy-related data in dashboards.
formats.name-kilovolt-ampere_description: Value format name in the list of available data value formats within the "Energy" category: It defines the display name for the Kilovolt-Ampere (kVA) unit, allowing users to select it for formatting apparent power measurements in dashboards.
formats.name-kilovolt-ampere-reactive_descriptio: Display name for a unit format in the value format settings for energy-related metrics: It identifies the "Kilovolt-Ampere reactive (kVAr)" unit for data visualization within dashboards.
formats.name-kilowatt_description: Unit Format Option Label in the Energy category within the Value Formats settings: Represents the display name for the Kilowatt (kW) unit. This option is presented to users for formatting energy-related data.
formats.name-kilowatt-hour_description: Unit format option name in the energy category of value format settings: This string represents the display name for the "Kilowatt-hour" unit. It allows users to select this unit for displaying energy values in dashboards.
formats.name-kilowatt-min_description: Display name in value formatting options: This label identifies the 'Kilowatt-minute (kWm)' unit for displaying energy-related metrics in BMC Helix Dashboards. Users can select this format to represent energy consumption or production over time.
formats.name-lumens_description: Format option label in Value format settings under the 'Energy' category: Identifies 'Lumens (Lm)' as a selectable unit of measurement for luminous flux. This string is displayed in unit selection dropdowns or configuration panels.
formats.name-megaohm_description: Display name for a unit format option in the 'Energy' category of value formatting settings, allowing users to select Megaohm (MΩ) for electrical resistance or impedance values.
formats.name-megawatt_description: Unit format name in data formatting options for energy-related metrics: Specifies 'Megawatt (MW)' as a unit for displaying numerical values.
formats.name-megawatt-hour_description: Unit format label in the value formatting options under the 'Energy' category: Represents the "Megawatt-hour (MWh)" unit for displaying energy values.
formats.name-microfarad_description: Unit option name in the Value format selector for the 'Energy' category: Allows users to display numerical data using the Microfarad (µF) unit. This unit, typically for capacitance, is categorized under 'Energy' within the system's available value formats.
formats.name-microhenry_description: Format option in the 'Energy' category of the Value Formats settings: This string represents the display name for the Microhenry (µH) unit, used when selecting how inductance values are formatted in dashboards.
formats.name-milliampere_description: Unit name in the Energy value format category: Represents the "Milliampere" unit for displaying electrical current in formatted data within dashboards.
formats.name-milliampere-hour_description: Unit display name in value format options within the 'energy' category: This string is used to label the 'Milliampere-hour' (mAh) unit when formatting energy-related data in BMC Helix Dashboards.
formats.name-millihenry_description: Unit format name in the energy category's value formats: Identifies 'Millihenry (mH)' as a selectable unit for displaying data values, particularly those related to inductance.
formats.name-milliohm_description: Unit label in the 'Energy' category of value formats: Defines the display name for the Milliohm (mΩ) unit for electrical resistance measurements.
formats.name-millivolt_description: Unit name in the Energy category of value format settings: This string identifies 'Millivolt (mV)' as a selectable unit for formatting and displaying electrical potential data within dashboards.
formats.name-milliwatt_description: Display name in the value format selection for energy units: Identifies the Millwatt (mW) unit for data representation in dashboards.
formats.name-nanofarad_description: Unit name in the energy category of value format settings: This string provides the display name for the Nanofarad (nF) unit of capacitance, used when formatting and visualizing energy-related data.
formats.name-ohm_description: Unit display name in value formatting options under the 'Energy' category: This display name represents the electrical resistance unit, Ohm, for data visualization.
formats.name-picofarad_description: Value format option name in the 'Energy' category of the value format selection: This string represents the 'Picofarad' unit, used for formatting and displaying data values.
formats.name-volt_description: Display name for a unit in the 'Energy' category of value formats within BMC Helix Dashboards: This string labels the 'Volt' unit for electrical potential measurements, including its standard abbreviation (V).
formats.name-volt-ampere_description: Display name in the value format options for the energy category: This label represents the Volt-Ampere (VA) unit for apparent power. It is used to format and display electrical power metrics.
formats.name-volt-ampere-reactive_description: Display name for a unit format in the value format selection list under the 'Energy' category: This option allows users to display numerical values representing reactive power in Volt-Ampere reactive (VAr) units within dashboards.
formats.name-watt_description: Unit name in the 'Energy' category of value format settings: Provides 'Watt (W)' as a selectable display option for energy-related data in dashboards.
formats.name-watt-hour_description: Format name in the 'Energy' category within value format options: Identifies 'Watt-hour (Wh)' as a selectable unit for displaying energy-related data in dashboards.
formats.name-watt-hour-per-kg_description: Value format option in the Energy category of Value Formats: Defines the display name and abbreviation for the unit 'Watt-hour per Kilogram (Wh/kg)', used for specific energy measurements.
formats.name-watt-square-meter_description: Unit display name in the value format options for the 'Energy' category in BMC Helix Dashboards: It represents the 'Watt per square meter (W/m²)' unit. This option allows users to format energy-related data visualizations using this specific measurement.

energy.name: Energy
energy.name_description: Category name in Value format categories: Represents a category for units and formatting options related to energy measurements.

formats.name-cubic-feet-min_description: Unit display name in the value format selection options for flow measurements: It allows users to choose "Cubic feet per minute (cfm)" as a unit for displaying flow rate data. This format includes the common abbreviation for clarity.
formats.name-cubic-feet-sec_description: Value format option name in the 'flow' category of Grafana data settings: Represents the display name for the 'cubic feet per second' unit. This option allows users to format numerical data related to flow measurements.
formats.name-cubic-meters-sec_description: Unit format name in the value formatting options for BMC Helix Dashboards: Used to display flow rates as cubic meters per second. The abbreviation 'cms' is provided for quick recognition.
formats.name-gallons-min_description: Unit format option in the Flow category settings: This label represents the 'Gallons per minute' unit for displaying flow rate values in dashboards.
formats.name-litre-hour_description: Value format option label in Grafana's data formatting settings under the 'Flow' category: Represents the unit for displaying flow rate measurements as Litres per hour.
formats.name-litre-min_description: Display unit option in the value formatting settings for flow-related metrics: Allows users to select "Litre/min" as the unit to display flow rate values on dashboards.
formats.name-lux_description: Unit label in the Flow category of Value Format Options: Specifies 'Lux (lx)' as a selectable unit for displaying illuminance data. This allows users to format relevant flow-related metrics to show values in Lux.
formats.name-millilitre-min_description: Display unit name in the value format selector for data visualizations, under the 'Flow' category: Used to represent flow rates in millilitres per minute (mL/min).

flow.name: Flow
flow.name_description: Category name in Value Formats settings: This string labels a category for formatting options related to "flow," typically indicating a rate of transfer or throughput. This category is used for metrics such as network bandwidth or data transfer rates.

formats.name-kilonewton-meters_description: Unit format name in the value formatting section for Grafana data panels, specifically within the 'Force' category: This text identifies the 'Kilonewton-meters' unit. It is an option for users to select when configuring how force-related data values are displayed.
formats.name-kilonewtons_description: Value format option label in the data formatting settings for force measurements: Labels the 'Kilonewtons (kN)' unit, allowing users to select this format for displaying force-related data.
formats.name-newton-meters_description: Unit format option in the 'Force' category within value format settings: Allows users to select 'Newton-meters (Nm)' as the display unit for force or torque measurements. This string represents the visible name for this unit option.
formats.name-newtons_description: Display name in value format options for force measurements: Represents the unit for force in Newtons.

force.name: Force
force.name_description: Category label in the value format unit selection: Identifies a group of units related to physical force, such as Newtons or pounds-force, available for display formatting in dashboards.

formats.name-exahashes-sec_description: Unit format name in Value formatting options for hash rate data within BMC Helix Dashboards: Represents the unit 'exahashes per second' for displaying extremely high hash rate metrics. This option allows users to select "exahashes/sec" as a display unit for relevant data.
formats.name-gigahashes-sec_description: Unit label in value formatting options for hash rate metrics: This string defines the "gigahashes/sec" unit. It is used when configuring how hash rate values are displayed in dashboards.
formats.name-hashes-sec_description: Unit label in the Grafana dashboard's value format category for hash-rate metrics: Used to specify 'hashes per second' as the display unit. This format is applied to data points representing computational or cryptographic hash rates.
formats.name-kilohashes-sec_description: Value format option name in a unit selection dropdown for data visualizations: Specifies the display unit for metrics related to hash rate as 'kilohashes per second'.
formats.name-megahashes-sec_description: Unit label in value format options for hash rate metrics: Represents 'megahashes/sec' as a selectable unit for displaying computational hash rates.
